section "4. VA-API / INTEL HD 520"
check "Firmware DMC (skl_dmc)" "ls /lib/firmware/i915/skl_dmc_*.bin 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
check "Firmware GuC (skl_guc)" "ls /lib/firmware/i915/skl_guc_*.bin 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
check "Firmware HuC (skl_huc)" "ls /lib/firmware/i915/skl_huc_*.bin 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
check "Render node /dev/dri/renderD128" "[ -e /dev/dri/renderD128 ]"
check "Pacote intel-media-va-driver-non-free" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*intel-media-va-driver-non-free'"
check "Pacote i965-va-driver-shaders" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*i965-va-driver-shaders'"
check "Pacote vainfo" "command -v vainfo >/dev/null 2>&1"
check "Pacote intel-gpu-tools" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*intel-gpu-tools'"
check "Driver iHD ativo" "vainfo 2>&1 | grep -q 'Driver version: Intel iHD'"
check "H.264 VA-API encode disponأ­vel" "vainfo 2>&1 | grep -q 'VAProfileH264Main.*VAEntrypointEncSlice'"
check "LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD" "grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD' /etc/environment 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD' /home/highlander/.bashrc 2>/dev/null"
check "LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH configurado" "grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri' /etc/environment 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri' /home/highlander/.bashrc 2>/dev/null"

if command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -e /dev/dri/renderD128 ]; then
    TMP_OUT="/tmp/clipfusion-vaapi-check.mp4"
    LOG_OUT="/tmp/clipfusion-vaapi-check.log"
    if ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -hwaccel vaapi -hwaccel_device /dev/dri/renderD128 \
        -f lavfi -i testsrc=duration=2:size=1280x720:rate=30 \
        -vf 'format=nv12,hwupload' \
        -c:v h264_vaapi -b:v 3M \
        "$TMP_OUT" >"$LOG_OUT" 2>&1; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} Smoke test ffmpeg VA-API"
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} Smoke test ffmpeg VA-API"
        FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    fi
    rm -f "$TMP_OUT" "$LOG_OUT"
else
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} Smoke test ffmpeg VA-API (ffmpeg ausente)"
    WARN=$((WARN + 1))
fi

section "6. SWAPFILE SSD"
check "Diretأ³rio /swap existe" "[ -d /swap ]"

check "Arquivo /swap/swapfile existe" "[ -f /swap/swapfile ]"
check "Swapfile >= 2GB" "[ \$(stat -c%s /swap/swapfile 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -ge 2000000000 ]"
check "Permissأ£o do swapfile = 600" "[ \"\$(stat -c '%a' /swap/swapfile 2>/dev/null)\" = '600' ]"
check "Swapfile ativo" "swapon --show 2>/dev/null | grep -q '/swap/swapfile'"
check "Swapfile prioridade 50" "swapon --show=NAME,PRIO 2>/dev/null | awk '\$1 == \"/swap/swapfile\" {print \$2}' | grep -qx '50'"
check "fstab contأ©m swapfile pri=50" "grep -Eq '^[^#]*/swap/swapfile[[:space:]]+none[[:space:]]+swap[[:space:]].*pri=50' /etc/fstab"

section "8. TDP UNLOCK / CPU / THERMAL"

check "Pacote thermald" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*thermald'"
check "thermald ativo" "systemctl is-active thermald >/dev/null 2>&1"
check "thermald habilitado" "systemctl is-enabled thermald >/dev/null 2>&1"
check "Pacote linux-cpupower" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*linux-cpupower'"
check "Governor performance" "cpupower frequency-info 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'governor \"performance\"' || grep -q 'GOVERNOR=\"performance\"' /etc/default/cpupower 2>/dev/null"
check "fstrim.timer habilitado" "systemctl is-enabled fstrim.timer >/dev/null 2>&1"
check "fstrim.timer ativo" "systemctl is-active fstrim.timer >/dev/null 2>&1"

if command -v sensors >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    temp="$(sensors 2>/dev/null | awk '/Core 0:/{gsub(/[+آ°C]/,"",$3); split($3,a,"."); print a[1]; exit}')"
    if [ -n "${temp:-}" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} Temperatura lida: ${temp}آ°C"
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} Temperatura nأ£o encontrada no sensors"
        WARN=$((WARN + 1))
    fi
else
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} lm-sensors / sensors ausente"
    WARN=$((WARN + 1))
fi

check_bashrc_line "export LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH no bashrc" 'export LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri'

echo ""
echo "â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گ"
echo "PASS: $PASS | WARN: $WARN | FAIL: $FAIL"
if [ "$FAIL" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… SISTEMA OK PARA COMEأ‡AR O CLIPFUSION${NC}"
    exit 0
else
    echo -e "${RED}â‌Œ AJUSTES NECESSأپRIOS ANTES DE COMEأ‡AR O CLIPFUSION${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

---
FILE: ./clipfusion-check.sh
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -u

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

PASS=0
FAIL=0
WARN=0

check() {
    local desc="$1"
    local cmd="$2"
    local severity="${3:-FAIL}"

    if eval "$cmd" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} $desc"
        return 0
    else
        if [ "$severity" = "WARN" ]; then
            WARN=$((WARN + 1))
            echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} $desc"
        else
            FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
            echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} $desc"
        fi
        return 1
    fi
}

section() {
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}â–¶ $1${NC}"
}

check_mount_opts() {
    local mountpoint="$1"
    local label="$2"
    shift 2
    local opts
    opts="$(findmnt -n -o OPTIONS "$mountpoint" 2>/dev/null || true)"
    if [ -z "$opts" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} $label montado"
        FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
        return 1
    fi

    echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} $label montado"
    PASS=$((PASS + 1))

    local opt
    for opt in "$@"; do
        if echo "$opts" | tr ',' '\n' | grep -Fxq "$opt"; then
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} $label: $opt"
            PASS=$((PASS + 1))
        else
            echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} $label: $opt"
            FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
        fi
    done
}

check_i3_line() {
    local desc="$1"
    local pattern="$2"
    if grep -Eq "$pattern" /home/highlander/.config/i3/config 2>/dev/null; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} $desc"
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} $desc"
        FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    fi
}

check_bashrc_line() {
    local desc="$1"
    local pattern="$2"
    if grep -Eq "$pattern" /home/highlander/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} $desc"
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} $desc"
        FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    fi
}

echo "â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—"
echo "â•‘      CLIPFUSION CHECK - DEBIAN TUNADO 3.0 (SEM DOCKER/PG)        â•‘"
echo "â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌"

section "1. HARDWARE E SISTEMA BASE"
echo "  CPU: $(grep 'model name' /proc/cpuinfo | head -1 | cut -d: -f2 | xargs 2>/dev/null)"
echo "  Kernel: $(uname -r)"
echo "  RAM: $(free -h | awk '/^Mem:/{print $2}')"
echo "  Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo "  Timezone: $(timedatectl show -p Timezone --value 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/timezone 2>/dev/null || echo desconhecida)"
check "CPU Intel i5-6200U" "lscpu | grep -q '6200U'"
check "RAM >= 7.5GB" "[ \$(free -m | awk '/^Mem:/{print \$2}') -ge 7500 ]"
check "Debian 12 / bookworm" "grep -q 'bookworm' /etc/os-release"
check "UEFI ativo" "[ -d /sys/firmware/efi ]"
check "Timezone America/Sao_Paulo" "timedatectl show -p Timezone --value 2>/dev/null | grep -qx 'America/Sao_Paulo' || grep -qx 'America/Sao_Paulo' /etc/timezone 2>/dev/null" "WARN"
check "Usuأ،rio highlander existe" "id highlander >/dev/null 2>&1"
check "Hostname clipfusion ou highlander" "hostname | grep -qiE 'clipfusion|highlander'" "WARN"

section "2. BTRFS E MOUNTS ESSENCIAIS"
check "Raiz em BTRFS" "findmnt -n -o FSTYPE / | grep -qx 'btrfs'"
check "Subvolume @ existe" "btrfs subvolume list / 2>/dev/null | awk '{print \$NF}' | grep -qx '@'"
check "Subvolume @home existe" "btrfs subvolume list / 2>/dev/null | awk '{print \$NF}' | grep -qx '@home'"
check "Subvolume @var existe" "btrfs subvolume list / 2>/dev/null | awk '{print \$NF}' | grep -qx '@var'"
check "Subvolume @snapshots existe" "btrfs subvolume list / 2>/dev/null | awk '{print \$NF}' | grep -qx '@snapshots'"
check "BTRFS sem erros" "btrfs device stats / 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=\$NF} END {exit(sum>0)}'"
check_mount_opts "/" "/" "compress=zstd:3" "noatime" "ssd" "discard=async" "space_cache=v2"
check_mount_opts "/home" "/home" "compress=zstd:3" "noatime" "ssd" "discard=async"
check_mount_opts "/var" "/var" "compress=zstd:3" "noatime" "ssd" "discard=async"
check_mount_opts "/.snapshots" "/.snapshots" "compress=zstd:3" "noatime" "ssd" "discard=async"
check "fstab: / em subvol=@" "grep -Eq '^[^#]+[[:space:]]+/[[:space:]]+btrfs[[:space:]].*subvol=@([,[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab"
check "fstab: /home em subvol=@home" "grep -Eq '^[^#]+[[:space:]]+/home[[:space:]]+btrfs[[:space:]].*subvol=@home([,[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab"
check "fstab: /var em subvol=@var" "grep -Eq '^[^#]+[[:space:]]+/var[[:space:]]+btrfs[[:space:]].*subvol=@var([,[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab"
check "fstab: /.snapshots em subvol=@snapshots" "grep -Eq '^[^#]+[[:space:]]+/\.snapshots[[:space:]]+btrfs[[:space:]].*subvol=@snapshots([,[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab"

section "3. KERNEL TUNING + NVIDIA BLOQUEADA"
check "blacklist-nvidia.conf existe" "[ -f /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nvidia.conf ]"
check "blacklist nouveau" "grep -q '^blacklist nouveau' /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nvidia.conf 2>/dev/null"
check "blacklist nvidia" "grep -q '^blacklist nvidia$' /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nvidia.conf 2>/dev/null"
check "blacklist nvidia_drm" "grep -q '^blacklist nvidia_drm' /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nvidia.conf 2>/dev/null"
check "blacklist nvidia_modeset" "grep -q '^blacklist nvidia_modeset' /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nvidia.conf 2>/dev/null"
check "nouveau modeset=0" "grep -q '^options nouveau modeset=0' /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist-nvidia.conf 2>/dev/null"
check "Mأ³dulo nouveau nأ£o carregado" "! lsmod | grep -q '^nouveau'"
check "Mأ³dulo nvidia nأ£o carregado" "! lsmod | grep -q '^nvidia'"
check "i915.enable_guc=3" "grep -qw 'i915.enable_guc=3' /proc/cmdline"
check "intel_pstate=active" "grep -qw 'intel_pstate=active' /proc/cmdline"
check "intel_pstate.max_perf_pct=100" "grep -qw 'intel_pstate.max_perf_pct=100' /proc/cmdline"
check "i915.enable_fbc=1" "grep -qw 'i915.enable_fbc=1' /proc/cmdline"
check "i915.enable_psr=0" "grep -qw 'i915.enable_psr=0' /proc/cmdline"
check "i915.fastboot=1" "grep -qw 'i915.fastboot=1' /proc/cmdline"
check "i915.modeset=1" "grep -qw 'i915.modeset=1' /proc/cmdline"
check "modprobe.blacklist=nouveau,nvidia,nvidia_drm,nvidia_modeset" "grep -qw 'modprobe.blacklist=nouveau,nvidia,nvidia_drm,nvidia_modeset' /proc/cmdline"
check "processor.max_cstate=5" "grep -qw 'processor.max_cstate=5' /proc/cmdline"
check "intel_iommu=on" "grep -qw 'intel_iommu=on' /proc/cmdline"
check "iommu=pt" "grep -qw 'iommu=pt' /proc/cmdline"
check "nmi_watchdog=0" "grep -qw 'nmi_watchdog=0' /proc/cmdline"
check "nowatchdog" "grep -qw 'nowatchdog' /proc/cmdline"
check "tsc=reliable" "grep -qw 'tsc=reliable' /proc/cmdline"
check "clocksource=tsc" "grep -qw 'clocksource=tsc' /proc/cmdline"
check "hpet=disable" "grep -qw 'hpet=disable' /proc/cmdline"
check "audit=0" "grep -qw 'audit=0' /proc/cmdline"
check "mitigations=off" "grep -qw 'mitigations=off' /proc/cmdline" "WARN"

section "4. VA-API / INTEL HD 520"
check "Firmware DMC (skl_dmc)" "ls /lib/firmware/i915/skl_dmc_*.bin 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
check "Firmware GuC (skl_guc)" "ls /lib/firmware/i915/skl_guc_*.bin 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
check "Firmware HuC (skl_huc)" "ls /lib/firmware/i915/skl_huc_*.bin 2>/dev/null | grep -q ."
check "Render node /dev/dri/renderD128" "[ -e /dev/dri/renderD128 ]"
check "Pacote intel-media-va-driver-non-free" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*intel-media-va-driver-non-free'"
check "Pacote i965-va-driver-shaders" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*i965-va-driver-shaders'"
check "Pacote vainfo" "command -v vainfo >/dev/null 2>&1"
check "Pacote intel-gpu-tools" "dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^ii.*intel-gpu-tools'"
check "Driver iHD ativo" "vainfo 2>&1 | grep -q 'Driver version: Intel iHD'"
check "H.264 VA-API encode disponأ­vel" "vainfo 2>&1 | grep -q 'VAProfileH264Main.*VAEntrypointEncSlice'"
check "LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD" "grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD' /etc/environment 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD' /home/highlander/.bashrc 2>/dev/null"
check "LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH configurado" "grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri' /etc/environment 2>/dev/null || grep -q 'LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri' /home/highlander/.bashrc 2>/dev/null"

if command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -e /dev/dri/renderD128 ]; then
    TMP_OUT="/tmp/clipfusion-vaapi-check.mp4"
    LOG_OUT="/tmp/clipfusion-vaapi-check.log"
    if ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -hwaccel vaapi -hwaccel_device /dev/dri/renderD128 \
        -f lavfi -i testsrc=duration=2:size=1280x720:rate=30 \
        -vf 'format=nv12,hwupload' \
        -c:v h264_vaapi -b:v 3M \
        "$TMP_OUT" >"$LOG_OUT" 2>&1; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} Smoke test ffmpeg VA-API"
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${RED}â‌Œ${NC} Smoke test ffmpeg VA-API"
        FAIL=$((FAIL + 1))
    fi
    rm -f "$TMP_OUT" "$LOG_OUT"
else
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} Smoke test ffmpeg VA-API (ffmpeg ausente)"
    WARN=$((WARN + 1))
fi

check "Arquivo /swap/swapfile existe" "[ -f /swap/swapfile ]"
check "Swapfile >= 2GB" "[ \$(stat -c%s /swap/swapfile 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -ge 2000000000 ]"
check "Permissأ£o do swapfile = 600" "[ \"\$(stat -c '%a' /swap/swapfile 2>/dev/null)\" = '600' ]"
check "Swapfile ativo" "swapon --show 2>/dev/null | grep -q '/swap/swapfile'"
check "Swapfile prioridade 50" "swapon --show=NAME,PRIO 2>/dev/null | awk '\$1 == \"/swap/swapfile\" {print \$2}' | grep -qx '50'"
check "fstab contأ©m swapfile pri=50" "grep -Eq '^[^#]*/swap/swapfile[[:space:]]+none[[:space:]]+swap[[:space:]].*pri=50' /etc/fstab"

check "fstrim.timer ativo" "systemctl is-active fstrim.timer >/dev/null 2>&1"

if command -v sensors >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    temp="$(sensors 2>/dev/null | awk '/Core 0:/{gsub(/[+آ°C]/,"",$3); split($3,a,"."); print a[1]; exit}')"
    if [ -n "${temp:-}" ]; then
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ…${NC} Temperatura lida: ${temp}آ°C"
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    else
        echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} Temperatura nأ£o encontrada no sensors"
        WARN=$((WARN + 1))
    fi
else
    echo -e "  ${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ${NC} lm-sensors / sensors ausente"
    WARN=$((WARN + 1))
fi

check "Arquivo /home/highlander/.config/i3/config existe" "[ -f /home/highlander/.config/i3/config ]"
check "Pasta /home/highlander/.config/i3 existe" "[ -d /home/highlander/.config/i3 ]"
check "Dono da pasta i3 أ© highlander" "[ \"\$(stat -c '%U:%G' /home/highlander/.config/i3 2>/dev/null)\" = 'highlander:highlander' ]"
check_i3_line "i3: gaps inner 0" '^[[:space:]]*gaps inner 0([[:space:]]|$)'
check_i3_line "i3: gaps outer 0" '^[[:space:]]*gaps outer 0([[:space:]]|$)'

check_i3_line "i3: atalho intel_gpu_top" 'bindsym[[:space:]]+\$mod\+Shift\+g[[:space:]]+exec[[:space:]]+urxvt[[:space:]]+-e[[:space:]]+intel_gpu_top'

section "11. USUأپRIO / EFI"

section "12. SCRIPTS / SNAPSHOT / ALIASES"
check "validate-system.sh existe" "[ -x /usr/local/bin/validate-system.sh ]" "WARN"
check "monitor-system.sh existe" "[ -x /usr/local/bin/monitor-system.sh ]"
check "snapshot-weekly.sh existe" "[ -x /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly.sh ]"
check "snapshot-weekly cria snapshot root" "grep -q 'btrfs subvolume snapshot -r /' /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly.sh 2>/dev/null"
check "snapshot-weekly cria snapshot home" "grep -q 'btrfs subvolume snapshot -r /home' /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly.sh 2>/dev/null"
check "snapshot-weekly KEEP=7" "grep -q '^KEEP=7' /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly.sh 2>/dev/null"
check "snapshot-weekly faz vacuum do journal" "grep -q 'journalctl --vacuum-time=7d' /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly.sh 2>/dev/null"
check "Crontab semanal do snapshot" "crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -Fqx '0 3 * * 0 /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly.sh'"
check_bashrc_line "alias ll" "alias ll='ls -lah'"
check_bashrc_line "alias update" "alias update='sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y'"
check_bashrc_line "alias temps" "alias temps='sensors \| grep Core'"
check_bashrc_line "alias validate" "alias validate='sudo /usr/local/bin/validate-system\.sh'"
check_bashrc_line "alias monitor" "alias monitor='sudo /usr/local/bin/monitor-system\.sh'"
check_bashrc_line "alias snapshot" "alias snapshot='sudo /usr/local/bin/snapshot-weekly\.sh'"
check_bashrc_line "export LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD no bashrc" 'export LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD'
check_bashrc_line "export LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH no bashrc" 'export LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri'

- 04_virada: Esperanأ§a + Empoderamento â€” Mudanأ§a de perspectiva â€” existe um caminho melhor que poucos conhecem.

2. Mأ³dulos dos "Mأ؛sculos" (Fأ،brica de Blindagem)

        Colorimetria: Ajuste de brilho/contraste via hardware.
        Injeأ§أ£o de Ruأ­do: Confusأ£o de algoritmos de similaridade.
        Chroma Subsampling: Alteraأ§أ£o da amostragem de cor.
        Ghost-Mode (Temporal): Frame Jittering para invalidar hashes de tempo.
        Horizontal Flip: Inversأ£o especular aleatأ³ria.

3. Mأ³dulos de Entrega (Pacote Social)

    post_pack.py: O sistema entrega o vأ­deo jأ، com tأ­tulo principal, 3 opأ§أµes de hooks, descriأ§أ£o, hashtags e comentأ،rio fixado

.
output_manager.py: Organiza tudo em pastas por projeto, separando o que أ© para cada plataforma, evitando bagunأ§a

    .


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ًںڑ€ O Fluxo Operacional (10 Etapas)

    Ingestأ£o: Vocأھ adiciona o vأ­deo; o sistema gera um ID e organiza a pasta

.
Transcriأ§أ£o: O Whisper gera o texto; o sistema detecta o idioma automaticamente
.
Filtro de Qualidade: O sistema marca e remove "lixo" sonoro ou erros de transcriأ§أ£o
.
Micro-Segmentaأ§أ£o: O sistema encontra blocos de 18-35s baseados na fala
.
Score Local: Cada trecho recebe notas de forأ§a de gancho e momento
.
Ponte Hأ­brida: Vocأھ leva o prompt pronto para a IA externa
.
Veredito IA: A IA devolve a anأ،lise editorial e a embalagem viral
.
Decisأ£o Automأ،tica: O sistema aplica a regra: Nota â‰¥ 9.0 = Aprovado; entre 7.0 e 8.9 = Refazer; < 7.0 = Descartar
.
Blindagem Mأ،xima: Os cortes aprovados passam pela fأ،brica de proteأ§أ£o anti-copy.
Postagem: Vocأھ recebe a pasta com o vأ­deo blindado e o texto do post pronto.

E agora vc diminuiu ele pra os topicos que eu pontuei pra que vc analisasse como melhorias?
1. Flexibilizar 18â€“35 segundos
Esta أ© uma das correأ§أµes mais vitais. A crأ­tica ao sistema anterior aponta que janelas de 55 segundos sأ£o "grossas demais", o que acaba diluindo o gancho viral no meio de um bloco muito longo
.

    Por que أ© bom: Grande parte do conteأ؛do viral em formato curto (Short-form) vive justamente entre 18 e 35 segundos

.
Implementaأ§أ£o: O SignalCut Hybrid jأ، propأµe faixas especأ­ficas para diferentes modos, como o Balanced (15â€“35s), garantindo que o sistema busque a "joia" sem gordura desnecessأ،ria

    .

2. Explicitar subnotas
Explicitar as notas resolve o "defeito tأ©cnico mais grave" do projeto original: a desconexأ£o de dados entre os mأ³dulos
.

    Vantagem: Em vez de uma nota mأ،gica e genأ©rica, vocأھ passa a ter visibilidade sobre hook_strength, moment_strength e retention_score

.
Resultado: Isso permite que vocأھ saiba exatamente por que um corte foi aprovado ou rejeitado, tornando a decisأ£o calibrأ،vel e menos dependente de "heurأ­sticas burras"

    .

3. Separar Discovery (Gancho) vs. Retention (Retenأ§أ£o)
A separaأ§أ£o clara entre o que faz o usuأ،rio parar o scroll (Discovery/Hook) e o que o faz assistir atأ© o fim (Retention) أ© o que diferencia um "tweet com timestamp" de um vأ­deo com alma
.

    Discovery: Foca no impacto inicial e na provocaأ§أ£o, algo muito forte no TikTok

.
Retention: Foca no arco narrativo e no payoff, garantindo que o algoritmo de plataformas como Shorts e Reels impulsione o vأ­deo

    .

4. Adicionar Fit por Plataforma
O sucesso nأ£o أ© universal; o que funciona em uma plataforma pode falhar em outra.

    TikTok: Valoriza o "scroll stop", o impacto e a provocaأ§أ£o

.
Reels: Depende mais de ritmo, limpeza visual e embalagem
.
Shorts: أ‰ movido por um arco enxuto e pela satisfaأ§أ£o do desfecho (payoff)
.
Sua ideia de criar scores separados (tiktok_fit, reels_fit, shorts_fit) أ© fundamental para uma estratأ©gia multi-plataforma eficiente

    .

5. Adicionar camada oficial de aprendizado
Esta camada permite que o sistema evolua de um conjunto de regras fixas para um motor inteligente.

    Fase de Dados: O learning_engine.py pode comeأ§ar usando apenas pesos e feedbacks reais, evoluindo para aprender quais duraأ§أµes e assuntos funcionam melhor para cada nicho

.
Melhoria Contأ­nua: Isso garante que o sistema pare de "refinar o erro" e comece a ajustar seus pesos com base no desempenho real dos posts

    .

6. Suavizar a promessa de multilinguismo
Esta أ© uma postura realista e tأ©cnica. A crأ­tica observou que o sistema atual أ© linguisticamente enviesado para o portuguأھs (PT-BR), o que prejudica a anأ،lise de conteأ؛dos complexos em inglأھs, como comأ©dia e entrevistas
.

    Foco Inicial: Em vez de prometer suporte global imediato, focar em consolidar a anأ،lise profunda (incluindo timing e reaأ§أµes) em um idioma por vez garante a qualidade do "momento cinematogrأ،fico" antes da escala

.

FILE: ./capture_errors.sh
#!/bin/bash
# capture_errors.sh - Salva TODOS os erros do terminal

LOG_DIR="$HOME/ClipFusion_V.2/src/logs"
mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"

TIMESTAMP=$(date '+%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
LOG_FILE="$LOG_DIR/error_${TIMESTAMP}.log"

# Cabeأ§alho
echo "â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گ" > "$LOG_FILE"
echo "CLIPFUSION ERROR LOG" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "Data: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گ" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# Executa e captura TUDO (stdout + stderr)
"$@" 2>&1 | tee -a "$LOG_FILE"

EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}

# Se deu erro, adiciona info do sistema
if [ $EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گ" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "SYSTEM INFO" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گ" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "Memأ³ria:" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    free -h >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    echo "ZRAM:" >> "$LOG_FILE"
    cat /proc/swaps >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A" >> "$LOG_FILE"
fi

exit $EXIT_CODE

FILE: ./Solicitacaofinalclip.txt
FASE 1: Estabilizaأ§أ£o do "Solo" (Sistema Operacional)
Antes do cأ³digo, o ambiente precisa ser imune a quedas de desempenho.

    Formataأ§أ£o Limpa: Reinstalar o Debian com BTRFS (zstd) para garantir compressأ£o nativa

.
Kernel de Elite: Configurar permanentemente i915.enable_guc=3 no GRUB para habilitar aceleraأ§أ£o total da Intel HD 520
.
Hierarquia de 14GB: Configurar o zRAM (6GB) com algoritmo lz4 e prioridade 100 sobre o swap de disco

    .
    Interface Minimalista: Configurar o i3wm para que o sistema operacional consuma o mأ­nimo de RAM, deixando o fأ´lego para o Whisper e o Render [Conversa].


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FASE 2: O Coraأ§أ£o dos Dados (Cأ©rebro e Memأ³ria)
Resolver o "defeito tأ©cnico mais grave" (desconexأ£o de dados) de uma vez por todas
.

    Schema Unificado (db.py): Criar as tabelas com campos explأ­citos (hook_strength, retention_score, moment_strength) usando DEFAULT 0.0

    .
    Base de Conhecimento de Erros: Implementar a tabela system_errors no SQLite para registrar falhas sem exclusأ£o automأ،tica [Conversa].
    O "Catcher" de Terminal: Instalar o script capture_errors.sh para salvar logs diأ،rios com carimbo de tempo e status da memأ³ria (ZRAM/Swap) [Conversa].


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FASE 3: Motor de Descoberta (Pipeline Viral)
Transformar a ferramenta de um "gerador de prompt" em um "descobridor de cenas"
.

    Transcriأ§أ£o Otimizada (transcribe.py): Extrair أ،udio WAV mono 16kHz e rodar o faster-whisper com compute_type="int8" para economizar RAM [51, Conversa].
    Filtro de Confianأ§a (transcription_quality.py): Descartar automaticamente trechos com pontuaأ§أ£o de qualidade abaixo de 0.7 para nأ£o contaminar a IA

.
Micro-Segmentaأ§أ£o (candidate_engine.py): Forأ§ar janelas de 18 a 35 segundos baseadas em pausas naturais, abandonando as janelas "grossas" de 55s
.
Scoring Multilingue: Ajustar os marcadores de nicho e hook para reconhecer conteأ؛dos em inglأھs e portuguأھs

    .


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FASE 4: Decisأ£o e Blindagem (Mأ؛sculos e Veredito)
Garantir que apenas o "ouro" seja processado e monetizado.

    Prompt Hأ­brido de Elite: Enviar apenas o shortlist dos melhores candidatos locais para a IA externa

.
Regra de Ouro (decision_engine.py): Aplicar o veredito automأ،tico: Nota â‰¥ 9.0 = Aprovado
.
Fأ،brica de Blindagem (protection_factory.py): Aplicar os 7 nأ­veis de proteأ§أ£o (zoom, cor, ruأ­do, etc.) via hardware
.
Renderizaأ§أ£o 2-Pass: Obrigatoriamente usar Passo 1 (VA-API) para proteأ§أ£o e Passo 2 (libx264) para legendas, evitando travamento de drivers

    .


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FASE 5: Entrega e Aprendizado (Postagem e Evoluأ§أ£o)
Organizar a saأ­da e preparar o futuro.

    Pacote Social (post_pack.py): Gerar automaticamente tأ­tulos, hooks, descriأ§أ£o e hashtags para cada corte

.
Agenda Anti-Padrأ£o: Usar o mecanismo de jitter para sugerir horأ،rios de postagem orgأ¢nicos
.
Ciclo de Aprendizado (learning_engine.py): Apأ³s postar, registrar o desempenho real para que o sistema reajuste os pesos dos arquأ©tipos no scoring.yaml

    .

Aأ§أ£o Imediata:

    Rode o seu instalador "full" (instalar_clipfusion_v2_completo.sh) para garantir o "solo" operacional

    .
    Aplique o patch do capture_errors.sh para comeأ§ar a documentar a sua Base de Conhecimento a partir do primeiro minuto de uso [Conversa].

Este plano garante que cada "momento cinematogrأ،fico" descoberto pelo seu sistema seja blindado e entregue com nota de confianأ§a real

␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P% ␀K␀E␀R␀N␀E␀L␀ ␀P%P%P%"␀;␀ ␀c␀h␀e␀c␀k␀_␀p␀a␀r␀a␀m␀ ␀'␀i␀9␀1␀5␀.␀e␀n␀a␀b␀l␀e␀_␀g␀u␀c␀=␀3␀'␀ ␀'␀i␀9␀1␀5␀.␀e␀n␀a␀b␀l␀e␀_␀g␀u␀c␀=␀3␀'␀;␀ ␀c␀h␀e␀c␀k␀_␀p␀a␀r␀a␀m␀ ␀'␀m␀i␀t␀i␀g␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀s␀=␀o␀f␀f␀'␀ ␀'␀m␀i␀t␀i␀g␀a␀t␀i␀o␀n␀s␀=␀o␀f␀f␀'␀␀
␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P% ␀N␀V␀I␀D␀I␀A␀ ␀P%P%P%"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀B␀l␀o␀q␀u␀e␀a␀d␀a␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀!␀ ␀l␀s␀m␀o␀d␀ ␀|␀ ␀g␀r␀e␀p␀ ␀-␀q␀ ␀n␀o␀u␀v␀e␀a␀u␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀␀
␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P% ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀ ␀P%P%P%"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀i␀H␀D␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀v␀a␀i␀n␀f␀o␀ ␀2␀>␀&␀1␀ ␀|␀ ␀g␀r␀e␀p␀ ␀-␀q␀ ␀'␀i␀H␀D␀'␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀H␀.␀2␀6␀4␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀v␀a␀i␀n␀f␀o␀ ␀2␀>␀&␀1␀ ␀|␀ ␀g␀r␀e␀p␀ ␀-␀q␀ ␀'␀E␀n␀c␀S␀l␀i␀c␀e␀'␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀␀
␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P% ␀M␀E␀M␀O␀R␀I␀A␀ ␀P%P%P%"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀Z␀R␀A␀M␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀s␀w␀a␀p␀o␀n␀ ␀-␀-␀s␀h␀o␀w␀ ␀|␀ ␀g␀r␀e␀p␀ ␀-␀q␀ ␀z␀r␀a␀m␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀S␀w␀a␀p␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀s␀w␀a␀p␀o␀n␀ ␀-␀-␀s␀h␀o␀w␀ ␀|␀ ␀g␀r␀e␀p␀ ␀-␀q␀ ␀s␀w␀a␀p␀f␀i␀l␀e␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀␀
␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P% ␀B␀T␀R␀F␀S␀ ␀P%P%P%"␀;␀ ␀S␀U␀B␀V␀O␀L␀=␀$␀(␀b␀t␀r␀f␀s␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀u␀m␀e␀ ␀l␀i␀s␀t␀ ␀/␀ ␀2␀>␀/␀d␀e␀v␀/␀n␀u␀l␀l␀ ␀|␀ ␀w␀c␀ ␀-␀l␀)␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀"␀S␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀u␀m␀e␀s␀:␀ ␀"␀;␀ ␀[␀ ␀"␀$␀S␀U␀B␀V␀O␀L␀"␀ ␀-␀g␀e␀ ␀6␀ ␀]␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀' ␀$␀S␀U␀B␀V␀O␀L␀$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L' ␀$␀S␀U␀B␀V␀O␀L␀$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀␀
␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P% ␀D␀O␀C␀K␀E␀R␀ ␀P%P%P%"␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀A␀t␀i␀v␀o␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀s␀y␀s␀t␀e␀m␀c␀t␀l␀ ␀i␀s␀-␀a␀c␀t␀i␀v␀e␀ ␀d␀o␀c␀k␀e␀r␀ ␀&␀>␀/␀d␀e␀v␀/␀n␀u␀l␀l␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀;␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀n␀ ␀'␀o␀v␀e␀r␀l␀a␀y␀2␀:␀ ␀'␀;␀ ␀d␀o␀c␀k␀e␀r␀ ␀i␀n␀f␀o␀ ␀2␀>␀/␀d␀e␀v␀/␀n␀u␀l␀l␀ ␀|␀ ␀g␀r␀e␀p␀ ␀-␀q␀ ␀'␀o␀v␀e␀r␀l␀a␀y␀2␀'␀ ␀&␀&␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀ ␀|␀|␀ ␀{␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L'$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀(␀(␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀+␀+␀)␀)␀;␀ ␀}␀␀
␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀"␀P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%P%"␀␀
␀i␀f␀ ␀[␀ ␀$␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀ ␀-␀e␀q␀ ␀0␀ ␀]␀;␀ ␀t␀h␀e␀n␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀G␀R␀E␀E␀N␀}␀' ␀S␀I␀S␀T␀E␀M␀A␀ ␀V␀A␀L␀I␀D␀A␀D␀O␀!␀$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀x␀i␀t␀ ␀0␀;␀ ␀e␀l␀s␀e␀ ␀e␀c␀h␀o␀ ␀-␀e␀ ␀"␀$␀{␀R␀E␀D␀}␀L' ␀F␀A␀L␀H␀A␀S␀:␀ ␀$␀{␀F␀A␀I␀L␀E␀D␀}␀$␀{␀N␀C␀}␀"␀;␀ ␀e␀x␀i␀t␀ ␀1␀;␀ ␀f␀i␀␀

␀E␀t␀a␀p␀a␀	␀O␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀f␀a␀z␀e␀r␀	␀C␀o␀m␀o␀␀
␀P␀r␀e␀p␀a␀r␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀	␀G␀e␀r␀a␀r␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀a␀n␀d␀o␀s␀ ␀d␀o␀ ␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀d␀o␀r␀	␀R␀o␀d␀a␀ ␀g␀e␀r␀a␀r␀-␀c␀o␀m␀a␀n␀d␀o␀s␀-␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀d␀o␀r␀.␀s␀h␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀W␀i␀n␀d␀o␀w␀s␀,␀ ␀s␀a␀l␀v␀a␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀c␀e␀l␀u␀l␀a␀r␀␀
␀I␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀D␀e␀b␀i␀a␀n␀	␀C␀r␀i␀a␀r␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀u␀m␀e␀s␀ ␀B␀T␀R␀F␀S␀	␀N␀o␀ ␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀d␀o␀r␀:␀ ␀A␀l␀t␀+␀F␀2␀ ␀’! ␀c␀o␀l␀a␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀a␀n␀d␀o␀s␀ ␀m␀a␀n␀u␀a␀l␀m␀e␀n␀t␀e␀␀
␀P␀r␀i␀m␀e␀i␀r␀o␀ ␀b␀o␀o␀t␀	␀F␀a␀s␀e␀ ␀2␀ ␀(␀k␀e␀r␀n␀e␀l␀,␀ ␀d␀r␀i␀v␀e␀r␀s␀,␀ ␀Z␀R␀A␀M␀,␀ ␀T␀D␀P␀)␀	␀L␀o␀g␀i␀n␀:␀ ␀h␀i␀g␀h␀l␀a␀n␀d␀e␀r␀ ␀’! ␀s␀u␀ ␀-␀ ␀’! ␀.␀/␀p␀o␀s␀-␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀c␀a␀o␀-␀f␀a␀s␀e␀2␀.␀s␀h␀ ␀’! ␀r␀e␀b␀o␀o␀t␀␀
␀S␀e␀g␀u␀n␀d␀o␀ ␀b␀o␀o␀t␀	␀F␀a␀s␀e␀ ␀3␀ ␀e␀ ␀4␀ ␀(␀i␀3␀w␀m␀,␀ ␀D␀o␀c␀k␀e␀r␀,␀ ␀v␀a␀l␀i␀d␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀)␀	␀L␀o␀g␀i␀n␀:␀ ␀h␀i␀g␀h␀l␀a␀n␀d␀e␀r␀ ␀’! ␀s␀u␀ ␀-␀ ␀’! ␀.␀/␀p␀o␀s␀-␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀c␀a␀o␀-␀f␀a␀s␀e␀3␀-␀4␀.␀s␀h␀ ␀’! ␀r␀e␀b␀o␀o␀t␀␀
␀U␀s␀o␀	␀S␀i␀s␀t␀e␀m␀a␀ ␀p␀r␀o␀n␀t␀o␀	␀L␀o␀g␀i␀n␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀i␀3␀w␀m␀,␀ ␀r␀o␀d␀e␀ ␀v␀a␀l␀i␀d␀a␀t␀e␀␀
␀Q␀u␀e␀r␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀e␀u␀ ␀g␀e␀r␀e␀ ␀u␀m␀ ␀a␀r␀q␀u␀i␀v␀o␀ ␀Z␀I␀P␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀ ␀e␀s␀s␀e␀s␀ ␀3␀ ␀s␀c␀r␀i␀p␀t␀s␀ ␀p␀r␀a␀ ␀v␀o␀c␀ê␀ ␀b␀a␀i␀x␀a␀r␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀W␀i␀n␀d␀o␀w␀s␀ ␀a␀n␀t␀e␀s␀ ␀d␀e␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀e␀ç␀a␀r␀?␀ ␀(␀V␀o␀c␀ê␀ ␀t␀e␀r␀i␀a␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀e␀x␀t␀r␀a␀i␀r␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀p␀e␀n␀d␀r␀i␀v␀e␀ ␀d␀e␀ ␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀o␀u␀ ␀t␀r␀a␀n␀s␀f␀e␀r␀i␀r␀ ␀p␀r␀o␀ ␀D␀e␀b␀i␀a␀n␀ ␀d␀e␀p␀o␀i␀s␀)␀␀

␀b␀t␀r␀f␀s␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀u␀m␀e␀ ␀c␀r␀e␀a␀t␀e␀ ␀/␀m␀n␀t␀/␀@␀p␀o␀s␀t␀g␀r␀e␀s␀␀
␀b␀t␀r␀f␀s␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀u␀m␀e␀ ␀c␀r␀e␀a␀t␀e␀ ␀/␀m␀n␀t␀/␀@␀v␀a␀r␀␀
␀b␀t␀r␀f␀s␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀u␀m␀e␀ ␀c␀r␀e␀a␀t␀e␀ ␀/␀m␀n␀t␀/␀@␀s␀n␀a␀p␀s␀h␀o␀t␀s␀␀

␀/␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀=␀@␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀r␀e␀s␀s␀=␀z␀s␀t␀d␀:␀3␀,␀n␀o␀a␀t␀i␀m␀e␀,␀s␀s␀d␀,␀d␀i␀s␀c␀a␀r␀d␀=␀a␀s␀y␀n␀c␀,␀s␀p␀a␀c␀e␀_␀c␀a␀c␀h␀e␀=␀v␀2␀␀
␀/␀h␀o␀m␀e␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀=␀@␀h␀o␀m␀e␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀r␀e␀s␀s␀=␀z␀s␀t␀d␀:␀3␀,␀n␀o␀a␀t␀i␀m␀e␀,␀s␀s␀d␀,␀d␀i␀s␀c␀a␀r␀d␀=␀a␀s␀y␀n␀c␀␀
␀/␀v␀a␀r␀/␀l␀i␀b␀/␀d␀o␀c␀k␀e␀r␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀=␀@␀d␀o␀c␀k␀e␀r␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀n␀o␀d␀a␀t␀a␀c␀o␀w␀,␀n␀o␀a␀t␀i␀m␀e␀,␀s␀s␀d␀,␀d␀i␀s␀c␀a␀r␀d␀=␀a␀s␀y␀n␀c␀␀
␀/␀v␀a␀r␀/␀l␀i␀b␀/␀p␀o␀s␀t␀g␀r␀e␀s␀q␀l␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀=␀@␀p␀o␀s␀t␀g␀r␀e␀s␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀n␀o␀d␀a␀t␀a␀c␀o␀w␀,␀n␀o␀a␀t␀i␀m␀e␀,␀s␀s␀d␀,␀d␀i␀s␀c␀a␀r␀d␀=␀a␀s␀y␀n␀c␀␀
␀/␀v␀a␀r␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀=␀@␀v␀a␀r␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀r␀e␀s␀s␀=␀z␀s␀t␀d␀:␀3␀,␀n␀o␀a␀t␀i␀m␀e␀,␀s␀s␀d␀,␀d␀i␀s␀c␀a␀r␀d␀=␀a␀s␀y␀n␀c␀␀
␀/␀.␀s␀n␀a␀p␀s␀h␀o␀t␀s␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀v␀o␀l␀=␀@␀s␀n␀a␀p␀s␀h␀o␀t␀s␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀r␀e␀s␀s␀=␀z␀s␀t␀d␀:␀3␀,␀n␀o␀a␀t␀i␀m␀e␀,␀s␀s␀d␀,␀d␀i␀s␀c␀a␀r␀d␀=␀a␀s␀y␀n␀c␀␀
␀2␀.␀7␀ ␀F␀i␀n␀a␀l␀i␀z␀a␀r␀␀

␀A␀g␀u␀a␀r␀d␀a␀r␀ ␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀b␀a␀s␀e␀␀
␀2␀.␀8␀ ␀P␀r␀i␀m␀e␀i␀r␀o␀ ␀B␀o␀o␀t␀␀

␀R␀e␀s␀u␀m␀o␀ ␀d␀a␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀a␀r␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀:␀␀

␀C␀o␀m␀p␀o␀n␀e␀n␀t␀e␀	␀D␀E␀F␀I␀N␀I␀T␀I␀V␀O␀ ␀(␀v␀a␀l␀i␀d␀a␀d␀o␀)␀	␀p␀r␀o␀j␀e␀t␀o␀_␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀2␀	␀S␀t␀a␀t␀u␀s␀␀
␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀l␀.␀s␀h␀	␀C␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀ ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀,␀ ␀v␀a␀l␀i␀d␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀D␀e␀b␀i␀a␀n␀ ␀T␀u␀n␀a␀d␀o␀	␀S␀i␀m␀p␀l␀i␀f␀i␀c␀a␀d␀o␀,␀ ␀s␀e␀m␀ ␀v␀a␀l␀i␀d␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀	␀L' ␀F␀a␀l␀t␀a␀n␀d␀o␀␀
␀c␀o␀n␀f␀i␀g␀.␀y␀a␀m␀l␀	␀C␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀ ␀(␀h␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀,␀ ␀w␀h␀i␀s␀p␀e␀r␀,␀ ␀r␀e␀n␀d␀e␀r␀,␀ ␀a␀n␀t␀i␀_␀c␀o␀p␀y␀,␀ ␀g␀u␀i␀,␀ ␀p␀l␀a␀t␀f␀o␀r␀m␀s␀)␀	␀L' ␀N␀م␀o␀ ␀e␀x␀i␀s␀t␀e␀	␀L' ␀F␀a␀l␀t␀a␀n␀d␀o␀␀
␀r␀e␀q␀u␀i␀r␀e␀m␀e␀n␀t␀s␀.␀t␀x␀t␀	␀w␀h␀i␀s␀p␀e␀r␀,␀ ␀n␀u␀m␀p␀y␀,␀ ␀p␀i␀l␀l␀o␀w␀,␀ ␀p␀y␀y␀a␀m␀l␀	␀w␀h␀i␀s␀p␀e␀r␀,␀ ␀n␀u␀m␀p␀y␀ ␀(␀s␀e␀m␀ ␀p␀i␀l␀l␀o␀w␀,␀ ␀p␀y␀y␀a␀m␀l␀)␀	␀ &‏ ␀I␀n␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀␀
␀m␀a␀i␀n␀.␀p␀y␀	␀I␀m␀p␀o␀r␀t␀a␀ ␀C␀l␀i␀p␀F␀u␀s␀i␀o␀n␀A␀p␀p␀	␀M␀e␀s␀m␀o␀	␀' ␀O␀K␀␀
␀d␀b␀.␀p␀y␀	␀M␀e␀s␀m␀o␀	␀M␀e␀s␀m␀o␀	␀' ␀O␀K␀␀
␀u␀t␀i␀l␀s␀/␀h␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀.␀p␀y␀	␀H␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀D␀e␀t␀e␀c␀t␀o␀r␀ ␀c␀l␀a␀s␀s␀ ␀+␀ ␀c␀h␀e␀c␀k␀_␀s␀y␀s␀t␀e␀m␀(␀)␀	␀L' ␀N␀م␀o␀ ␀e␀x␀i␀s␀t␀e␀	␀L' ␀F␀a␀l␀t␀a␀n␀d␀o␀␀
␀c␀o␀r␀e␀/␀t␀r␀a␀n␀s␀c␀r␀i␀b␀e␀r␀.␀p␀y␀	␀W␀h␀i␀s␀p␀e␀r␀T␀r␀a␀n␀s␀c␀r␀i␀b␀e␀r␀ ␀P␀y␀t␀h␀o␀n␀ ␀A␀P␀I␀ ␀(␀m␀a␀i␀s␀ ␀r␀ل␀p␀i␀d␀o␀)␀	␀t␀r␀a␀n␀s␀c␀r␀i␀b␀e␀(␀)␀ ␀f␀u␀n␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀s␀i␀m␀p␀l␀e␀s␀ ␀(␀C␀L␀I␀)␀	␀ &‏ ␀I␀n␀f␀e␀r␀i␀o␀r␀␀
␀c␀o␀r␀e␀/␀c␀u␀t␀_␀e␀n␀g␀i␀n␀e␀.␀p␀y␀	␀R␀e␀n␀d␀e␀r␀ ␀2␀-␀p␀a␀s␀s␀ ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀ ␀c␀o␀r␀r␀e␀t␀o␀ ␀+␀ ␀a␀n␀t␀i␀-␀c␀o␀p␀y␀r␀i␀g␀h␀t␀	␀R␀e␀n␀d␀e␀r␀ ␀1␀-␀p␀a␀s␀s␀ ␀s␀َ␀ ␀l␀i␀b␀x␀2␀6␀4␀ ␀(␀s␀e␀m␀ ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀)␀	␀L' ␀E␀r␀r␀a␀d␀o␀␀
␀c␀o␀r␀e␀/␀p␀r␀o␀m␀p␀t␀_␀b␀u␀i␀l␀d␀e␀r␀.␀p␀y␀	␀M␀e␀s␀m␀o␀	␀M␀e␀s␀m␀o␀	␀' ␀O␀K␀␀
␀a␀n␀t␀i␀_␀c␀o␀p␀y␀_␀m␀o␀d␀u␀l␀e␀s␀/␀	␀7␀ ␀m␀َ␀d␀u␀l␀o␀s␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀s␀	␀7␀ ␀m␀َ␀d␀u␀l␀o␀s␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀s␀	␀' ␀O␀K␀␀
␀v␀i␀r␀a␀l␀_␀e␀n␀g␀i␀n␀e␀/␀	␀6␀ ␀m␀َ␀d␀u␀l␀o␀s␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀s␀	␀6␀ ␀m␀َ␀d␀u␀l␀o␀s␀ ␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀s␀	␀' ␀O␀K␀␀
␀g␀u␀i␀/␀m␀a␀i␀n␀_␀g␀u␀i␀.␀p␀y␀	␀7␀ ␀a␀b␀a␀s␀ ␀+␀ ␀l␀a␀z␀y␀ ␀l␀o␀a␀d␀i␀n␀g␀ ␀+␀ ␀g␀c␀.␀c␀o␀l␀l␀e␀c␀t␀ ␀+␀ ␀h␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀ ␀s␀t␀a␀t␀u␀s␀	␀6␀ ␀a␀b␀a␀s␀ ␀(␀s␀e␀m␀ ␀A␀g␀e␀n␀d␀a␀)␀ ␀+␀ ␀s␀e␀m␀ ␀h␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀ ␀s␀t␀a␀t␀u␀s␀	␀ &‏ ␀I␀n␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀␀
␀P␀r␀o␀b␀l␀e␀m␀a␀s␀ ␀c␀r␀ي␀t␀i␀c␀o␀s␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀p␀r␀o␀j␀e␀t␀o␀_␀c␀o␀m␀p␀l␀e␀t␀o␀2␀:␀␀
␀1␀.␀ ␀S␀e␀m␀ ␀u␀t␀i␀l␀s␀/␀h␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀.␀p␀y␀␀
␀P␀e␀r␀d␀e␀ ␀H␀a␀r␀d␀w␀a␀r␀e␀D␀e␀t␀e␀c␀t␀o␀r␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀m␀o␀s␀t␀r␀a␀ ␀s␀t␀a␀t␀u␀s␀ ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀h␀e␀a␀d␀e␀r␀␀
␀P␀e␀r␀d␀e␀ ␀c␀h␀e␀c␀k␀_␀s␀y␀s␀t␀e␀m␀(␀)␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀v␀a␀l␀i␀d␀a␀ ␀D␀e␀b␀i␀a␀n␀ ␀T␀u␀n␀a␀d␀o␀␀
␀2␀.␀ ␀T␀r␀a␀n␀s␀c␀r␀i␀b␀e␀r␀ ␀i␀n␀f␀e␀r␀i␀o␀r␀␀
␀D␀E␀F␀I␀N␀I␀T␀I␀V␀O␀:␀ ␀P␀y␀t␀h␀o␀n␀ ␀A␀P␀I␀ ␀(␀W␀h␀i␀s␀p␀e␀r␀T␀r␀a␀n␀s␀c␀r␀i␀b␀e␀r␀ ␀c␀l␀a␀s␀s␀)␀ ␀  ␀m␀a␀i␀s␀ ␀r␀ل␀p␀i␀d␀o␀,␀ ␀m␀e␀n␀o␀s␀ ␀R␀A␀M␀␀
␀p␀r␀o␀j␀e␀t␀o␀2␀:␀ ␀C␀L␀I␀ ␀v␀i␀a␀ ␀s␀u␀b␀p␀r␀o␀c␀e␀s␀s␀ ␀  ␀m␀a␀i␀s␀ ␀l␀e␀n␀t␀o␀␀
␀3␀.␀ ␀C␀u␀t␀ ␀e␀n␀g␀i␀n␀e␀ ␀e␀r␀r␀a␀d␀o␀␀
␀D␀E␀F␀I␀N␀I␀T␀I␀V␀O␀:␀ ␀2␀-␀p␀a␀s␀s␀ ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀ ␀(␀p␀a␀s␀s␀o␀ ␀1␀:␀ ␀c␀o␀r␀t␀e␀/␀e␀s␀c␀a␀l␀a␀ ␀V␀A␀-␀A␀P␀I␀,␀ ␀p␀a␀s␀s␀o␀ ␀2␀:␀ ␀l␀e␀g␀e␀n␀d␀a␀ ␀s␀o␀f␀t␀w␀a␀r␀e␀)␀␀

␀Q␀u␀e␀r␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀e␀u␀ ␀g␀e␀r␀e␀ ␀u␀m␀ ␀s␀c␀r␀i␀p␀t␀ ␀d␀e␀ ␀i␀n␀s␀t␀a␀l␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀ْ␀n␀i␀c␀o␀ ␀q␀u␀e␀ ␀a␀u␀t␀o␀m␀a␀t␀i␀z␀a␀ ␀a␀ ␀c␀r␀i␀a␀ç␀م␀o␀ ␀d␀e␀ ␀T␀O␀D␀O␀S␀ ␀o␀s␀ ␀a␀r␀q␀u␀i␀v␀o␀s␀ ␀d␀o␀ ␀c␀l␀i␀p␀f␀u␀s␀i␀o␀n␀_␀D␀E␀F␀I␀N␀I␀T␀I␀V␀O␀.␀t␀x␀t␀ ␀n␀o␀ ␀D␀e␀b␀i␀a␀n␀ ␀T␀u␀n␀a␀d␀o␀ ␀3␀.␀0␀?␀␀

# ==============================================================================
# ARQUIVO: install.sh
# Executar PRIMEIRO apأ³s o Debian Tunado 3.0 estar pronto
# ==============================================================================
#!/bin/bash
set -e
GRN='\033[0;32m'; YEL='\033[1;33m'; RED='\033[0;31m'; NC='\033[0m'
ok()   { echo -e "${GRN}[âœ“]${NC} $1"; }
warn() { echo -e "${YEL}[!]${NC} $1"; }
err()  { echo -e "${RED}[âœ—]${NC} $1"; exit 1; }

echo ""
echo "â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—"
echo "â•‘  ClipFusion Viral Pro â€” Instalaأ§أ£o     â•‘"
echo "â•‘  Hardware: i5-6200U + Intel HD 520     â•‘"
echo "â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌"
echo ""

# 1. Verificaأ§أ£o do Debian Tunado
if ! grep -q "i915.enable_guc=3" /proc/cmdline; then
    warn "Kernel sem i915.enable_guc=3 â€” execute o Debian Tunado 3.0 primeiro."
fi

# 2. Dependأھncias do sistema
sudo apt update -qq
sudo apt install -y \
    python3 python3-pip python3-venv python3-tk \
    ffmpeg git curl wget \
    intel-media-va-driver-non-free \
    libva-drm2 libva-x11-2 libva-glx2 \
    i965-va-driver-shaders \
    vainfo intel-gpu-tools \
    lm-sensors 2>/dev/null || true
ok "Dependأھncias do sistema (VA-API Intel HD 520 incluأ­do)"

# 3. Validaأ§أ£o VA-API
echo "Verificando VA-API..."
export LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD
if vainfo 2>&1 | grep -q "VAEntrypointEncSlice"; then
    ok "VA-API Intel HD 520 â€” H.264 encode disponأ­vel (3x mais rأ،pido)"
elif vainfo 2>&1 | grep -q "i965"; then
    warn "VA-API driver i965 (fallback) â€” funciona, mas mais lento que iHD"
else
    warn "VA-API nأ£o detectado â€” render usarأ، CPU (libx264)"
fi

# Persiste variأ،veis VA-API
if ! grep -q "LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME" ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; then
    echo 'export LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD' >> ~/.bashrc
    echo 'export LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri' >> ~/.bashrc
fi

# 4. Estrutura de pastas
mkdir -p ~/clipfusion
cd ~/clipfusion
mkdir -p utils core gui anti_copy_modules viral_engine config
touch utils/__init__.py core/__init__.py gui/__init__.py
touch anti_copy_modules/__init__.py viral_engine/__init__.py
mkdir -p ~/.clipfusion  # banco SQLite
ok "Estrutura de pastas criada"

# 5. Ambiente Python
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install --upgrade pip --quiet
pip install openai-whisper numpy pillow pyyaml --quiet
ok "Pacotes Python instalados"

# 6. Verifica instalaأ§أ£o
python3 -c "import whisper" 2>/dev/null && ok "Whisper OK" || err "Whisper falhou"
command -v ffmpeg &>/dev/null && ok "FFmpeg: $(ffmpeg -version 2>&1 | head -1 | awk '{print $3}')" || err "FFmpeg nأ£o encontrado"

# 7. Script de execuأ§أ£o
cat > ~/clipfusion/run.sh << 'RUNEOF'
#!/bin/bash
cd "$(dirname "$0")"
export LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD
export LIBVA_DRIVERS_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/dri
source venv/bin/activate
echo "ًں”چ Verificando sistema..."
python3 -c "from utils.hardware import check_system; check_system()" 2>/dev/null || true
echo ""
echo "ًںڑ€ Iniciando ClipFusion Viral Pro..."
python3 main.py
RUNEOF
chmod +x ~/clipfusion/run.sh
ok "run.sh criado"

echo ""
echo "â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—"
echo "â•‘  âœ… PRONTO â€” para iniciar:             â•‘"
echo "â•‘     cd ~/clipfusion && ./run.sh        â•‘"
echo "â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌"
echo ""


# ==============================================================================
# ARQUIVO: config.yaml
# Todas as configuraأ§أµes em um lugar â€” edite aqui, nأ£o no cأ³digo
# ==============================================================================
# ClipFusion Viral Pro â€” Configuraأ§أ£o para i5-6200U + Intel HD 520

hardware:
  encoder_preferido: "auto"    # auto | h264_vaapi | libx264
  max_ram_gb: 6                # Reserva 2GB para o sistema
  usar_gpu_intel: true

whisper:
  modelo: "tiny"               # tiny (39MB) | base (74MB) | small (244MB)
  idioma: "pt"
  dispositivo: "cpu"           # cpu â€” NVIDIA desabilitada

render:
  preset: "fast"               # ultrafast | fast | medium
  crf: 23                      # 18=alta qualidade, 23=equilأ­brio, 28=menor arquivo
  usar_vaapi: true

anti_copy:
  nivel: "basic"               # none | basic | anti_ai | maximum

gui:
  tema_escuro: true
  janela_inicio: "1120x800"

platforms:
  - tiktok
  - reels
  - shorts

# ==============================================================================
# ARQUIVO: main.py
# ==============================================================================
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""ClipFusion Viral Pro â€” Entry point"""
import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))

from gui.main_gui import ClipFusionApp

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app = ClipFusionApp()
    app.run()


# ==============================================================================
# ARQUIVO: db.py
# ==============================================================================
"""ClipFusion â€” SQLite. Histأ³rico de projetos, transcriأ§أµes e cortes."""
import sqlite3, json, os
from pathlib import Path

DB_PATH = Path(os.path.expanduser("~")) / ".clipfusion" / "db.sqlite"


def _conn():
    DB_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    c = sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH))
    c.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    return c


def init():
    c = _conn()
    c.executescript("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            name TEXT, video_path TEXT,
            status TEXT DEFAULT 'novo',
            created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        );
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcriptions (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            project_id INTEGER, full_text TEXT, segments TEXT,
            created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        );
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cuts (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            project_id INTEGER, cut_index INTEGER,
            start_time REAL, end_time REAL,
            title TEXT, archetype TEXT, hook TEXT, reason TEXT,
            platforms TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'pendente',
            output_paths TEXT, metadata TEXT,
            created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        );
    """)
    c.commit(); c.close()


def create_project(name, video_path):
    c = _conn()
    cur = c.execute(
        "INSERT INTO projects (name,video_path,status) VALUES (?,?,'transcrevendo')",
        (name, video_path))
    pid = cur.lastrowid; c.commit(); c.close(); return pid

def update_project_status(pid, status):
    c = _conn()
    c.execute("UPDATE projects SET status=? WHERE id=?", (status, pid))
    c.commit(); c.close()

def get_project(pid):
    c = _conn()
    r = c.execute("SELECT * FROM projects WHERE id=?", (pid,)).fetchone()
    c.close()
    return dict(r) if r else None

def list_projects():
    c = _conn()
    rows = c.execute("SELECT * FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC").fetchall()
    c.close()
    return [dict(r) for r in rows]

def save_transcription(pid, full_text, segments):
    c = _conn()
    c.execute(
        "INSERT INTO transcriptions (project_id,full_text,segments) VALUES (?,?,?)",
        (pid, full_text, json.dumps(segments, ensure_ascii=False)))
    c.commit(); c.close()

def get_transcription(pid):
    c = _conn()
    r = c.execute(
        "SELECT * FROM transcriptions WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1",
        (pid,)).fetchone()
    c.close()
    if not r: return None
    d = dict(r); d["segments"] = json.loads(d["segments"] or "[]"); return d

def save_cuts(pid, cuts):
    c = _conn(); c.execute("DELETE FROM cuts WHERE project_id=?", (pid,))
    for i, cut in enumerate(cuts):
        c.execute("""INSERT INTO cuts
            (project_id,cut_index,start_time,end_time,title,archetype,
             hook,reason,platforms,status,metadata)
            VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)""",
            (pid, i, cut["start"], cut["end"], cut.get("title",""),
             cut.get("archetype",""), cut.get("hook",""), cut.get("reason",""),
             json.dumps(cut.get("platforms",[])), "pendente",
             json.dumps(cut.get("metadata",{}), ensure_ascii=False)))
    c.commit(); c.close()

def get_cuts(pid, status=None):
    c = _conn()
    if status:
        rows = c.execute(
            "SELECT * FROM cuts WHERE project_id=? AND status=? ORDER BY cut_index",
            (pid, status)).fetchall()
    else:
        rows = c.execute(
            "SELECT * FROM cuts WHERE project_id=? ORDER BY cut_index",
            (pid,)).fetchall()
    c.close()
    result = []
    for r in rows:
        d = dict(r)
        d["platforms"]    = json.loads(d["platforms"]    or "[]")
        d["output_paths"] = json.loads(d["output_paths"] or "{}")
        d["metadata"]     = json.loads(d["metadata"]     or "{}")
        result.append(d)
    return result

def update_cut_status(cut_id, status):
    c = _conn()
    c.execute("UPDATE cuts SET status=? WHERE id=?", (status, cut_id))
    c.commit(); c.close()

def update_cut_output(cut_id, paths):
    c = _conn()
    c.execute(
        "UPDATE cuts SET output_paths=?,status='renderizado' WHERE id=?",
        (json.dumps(paths), cut_id))
    c.commit(); c.close()


init()

# ==============================================================================
# ARQUIVO: utils/hardware.py
# ORIGEM: CAMPEأƒO â€” HardwareDetector class standalone أ© diferencial real
# ==============================================================================
"""Utils â€” Detecأ§أ£o de hardware otimizada para i5-6200U + Intel HD 520."""
import subprocess
import os


class HardwareDetector:
    """Detecta e configura hardware automaticamente."""

    def __init__(self):
        self.info = self._detect_all()

    def _detect_all(self) -> dict:
        return {
            'cpu':     self._detect_cpu(),
            'gpu':     self._detect_gpu(),
            'ram_gb':  self._detect_ram(),
            'encoder': self._detect_encoder(),
            'vaapi':   self._check_vaapi(),
        }

    def _detect_cpu(self) -> dict:
        try:
            with open('/proc/cpuinfo') as f:
                lines = f.readlines()
            model, cores = "", 0
            for line in lines:
                if 'model name' in line and not model:
                    model = line.split(':')[1].strip()
                if 'processor' in line:
                    cores += 1
            return {'model': model, 'cores': cores}
        except:
            return {'model': 'i5-6200U', 'cores': 4}

    def _detect_gpu(self) -> dict:
        gpu_info = {'intel': False, 'nvidia': False, 'driver': 'none'}
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['lspci'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if 'HD Graphics 520' in r.stdout or 'UHD' in r.stdout:
                gpu_info['intel'] = True
                gpu_info['driver'] = 'i915'
        except: pass
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['lsmod'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if 'nvidia' in r.stdout or 'nouveau' in r.stdout:
                gpu_info['nvidia'] = True
        except: pass
        return gpu_info

    def _detect_ram(self) -> float:
        try:
            with open('/proc/meminfo') as f:
                line = f.readline()
            kb = int(line.split()[1])
            return round(kb / 1024 / 1024, 1)
        except:
            return 8.0

    def _detect_encoder(self) -> str:
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['vainfo'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in r.stdout:
                return 'h264_vaapi'
        except: pass
        return 'libx264'

    def _check_vaapi(self) -> dict:
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['vainfo'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            return {
                'disponivel':  'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in r.stdout,
                'driver':      'iHD' if 'iHD' in r.stdout else 'i965',
                'encode_h264': 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in r.stdout,
            }
        except:
            return {'disponivel': False, 'driver': 'none', 'encode_h264': False}

    def get_encoder(self) -> str:
        return 'h264_vaapi' if self.info['vaapi']['disponivel'] else 'libx264'

    def get_status_string(self) -> str:
        """Retorna string de status para a GUI."""
        enc   = self.get_encoder()
        vaapi = 'âœ… VA-API' if enc == 'h264_vaapi' else 'âڑ ï¸ڈ CPU'
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['sensors'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            for line in r.stdout.split('\n'):
                if 'Core 0' in line:
                    temp = line.split()[2].replace('+','').replace('آ°C','')
                    return f"{vaapi}  |  CPU {temp}آ°C  |  RAM {self.info['ram_gb']}GB"
        except: pass
        return f"{vaapi}  |  i5-6200U  |  RAM {self.info['ram_gb']}GB"

    def print_summary(self):
        print("â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—")
        print("â•‘  Hardware Detectado                   â•‘")
        print("â• â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•£")
        print(f"  CPU: {self.info['cpu']['model']}")
        print(f"  RAM: {self.info['ram_gb']} GB")
        print(f"  GPU Intel: {'âœ…' if self.info['gpu']['intel'] else 'â‌Œ'}")
        print(f"  NVIDIA:    {'âڑ ï¸ڈ  ATIVA' if self.info['gpu']['nvidia'] else 'âœ… Bloqueada'}")
        print(f"  VA-API:    {'âœ…' if self.info['vaapi']['disponivel'] else 'â‌Œ'}")
        print(f"  Encoder:   {self.info['encoder']}")
        print("â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌")


def check_system() -> bool:
    """Verifica se o sistema estأ، otimizado para ClipFusion."""
    print("\nًں”چ Verificando Debian Tunado 3.0...")
    checks = []

    try:
        with open('/proc/cmdline') as f:
            cmdline = f.read()
        checks.append(('i915.enable_guc=3', 'i915.enable_guc=3' in cmdline))
        checks.append(('mitigations=off',   'mitigations=off'   in cmdline))
    except:
        checks.extend([('i915.enable_guc=3', False), ('mitigations=off', False)])

    try:
        r = subprocess.run(['swapon', '--show'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        checks.append(('ZRAM ativo', 'zram' in r.stdout))
    except:
        checks.append(('ZRAM ativo', False))

    try:
        r = subprocess.run(['lsmod'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        checks.append(('NVIDIA bloqueada', 'nvidia' not in r.stdout and 'nouveau' not in r.stdout))
    except:
        checks.append(('NVIDIA bloqueada', False))

    try:
        r = subprocess.run(['vainfo'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        checks.append(('VA-API iHD', 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in r.stdout))
    except:
        checks.append(('VA-API iHD', False))

    for check, status in checks:
        print(f"  {'âœ…' if status else 'â‌Œ'} {check}")

    ok = all(s for _, s in checks)
    print("\nâœ… Sistema pronto!\n" if ok else "\nâڑ ï¸ڈ  Algumas otimizaأ§أµes ausentes.\n")
    return ok


if __name__ == '__main__':
    hw = HardwareDetector()
    hw.print_summary()
    check_system()


# ==============================================================================
