FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion/utils/hardware.py
import subprocess
import os

class HardwareDetector:
    def __init__(self):
        self.info = self._detect_all()

    def _detect_all(self) -> dict:
        return {
            'cpu': self._detect_cpu(),
            'gpu': self._detect_gpu(),
            'ram_gb': self._detect_ram(),
            'encoder': self._detect_encoder(),
            'vaapi': self._check_vaapi(),
        }

    def _detect_cpu(self) -> dict:
        try:
            with open('/proc/cpuinfo') as f:
                lines = f.readlines()
            model, cores = "", 0
            for line in lines:
                if 'model name' in line and not model:
                    model = line.split(':')[1].strip()
                if 'processor' in line:
                    cores += 1
            return {'model': model, 'cores': cores}
        except:
            return {'model': 'i5-6200U', 'cores': 4}

    def _detect_gpu(self) -> dict:
        gpu_info = {'intel': False, 'nvidia': False, 'driver': 'none'}
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['lspci'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if 'HD Graphics 520' in r.stdout or 'UHD' in r.stdout:
                gpu_info['intel'] = True
                gpu_info['driver'] = 'i915'
        except: pass
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['lsmod'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            if 'nvidia' in r.stdout or 'nouveau' in r.stdout:
                gpu_info['nvidia'] = True
        except: pass
        return gpu_info

    def _detect_ram(self) -> float:
        try:
            with open('/proc/meminfo') as f:
                line = f.readline()
            kb = int(line.split()[1])
            return round(kb / 1024 / 1024, 1)
        except:
            return 8.0

    def _detect_encoder(self) -> str:
        try:
            env = dict(os.environ)
            env.setdefault('LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME', 'iHD')
            r = subprocess.run(['vainfo'], env=env, capture_output=True, text=True)
            if 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in r.stdout:
                return 'h264_vaapi'
        except: pass
        return 'libx264'

    def _check_vaapi(self) -> dict:
        try:
            env = dict(os.environ)
            env.setdefault('LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME', 'iHD')
            r = subprocess.run(['vainfo'], env=env, capture_output=True, text=True)
            out = r.stdout + r.stderr
            return {
                'disponivel': 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in out,
                'driver': 'iHD' if 'iHD' in out else 'i965',
                'encode_h264': 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in out,
            }
        except:
            return {'disponivel': False, 'driver': 'none', 'encode_h264': False}

    def get_encoder(self) -> str:
        return 'h264_vaapi' if self.info['vaapi']['disponivel'] else 'libx264'

    def get_status_string(self) -> str:
        enc = self.get_encoder()
        vaapi = 'âœ… VA-API' if enc == 'h264_vaapi' else 'âڑ ï¸ڈ CPU'
        try:
            r = subprocess.run(['sensors'], capture_output=True, text=True)
            for line in r.stdout.split('\n'):
                if 'Core 0' in line:
                    temp = line.split()[2].replace('+','').replace('آ°C','')
                    return f"{vaapi}  |  CPU {temp}آ°C  |  RAM {self.info['ram_gb']}GB"
        except: pass
        return f"{vaapi}  |  i5-6200U  |  RAM {self.info['ram_gb']}GB"

    def print_summary(self):
        print("â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—")
        print("â•‘  Hardware Detectado                   â•‘")
        print("â• â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•£")
        print(f"  CPU: {self.info['cpu']['model']}")
        print(f"  RAM: {self.info['ram_gb']} GB")
        print(f"  GPU Intel: {'âœ…' if self.info['gpu']['intel'] else 'â‌Œ'}")
        print(f"  NVIDIA:    {'âڑ ï¸ڈ  ATIVA' if self.info['gpu']['nvidia'] else 'âœ… Bloqueada'}")
        print(f"  VA-API:    {'âœ…' if self.info['vaapi']['disponivel'] else 'â‌Œ'}")
        print(f"  Encoder:   {self.info['encoder']}")
        print("â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌")

def check_system() -> bool:
    print("\nًں”چ Verificando Debian Tunado 3.0...")
    checks = []
    try:
        with open('/proc/cmdline') as f:
            cmdline = f.read()
        checks.append(('i915.enable_guc=3', 'i915.enable_guc=3' in cmdline))
        checks.append(('mitigations=off',   'mitigations=off'   in cmdline))
    except:
        checks.extend([('i915.enable_guc=3', False), ('mitigations=off', False)])
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(['swapon', '--show'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        checks.append(('ZRAM ativo', 'zram' in r.stdout))
    except:
        checks.append(('ZRAM ativo', False))
    try:
        r = subprocess.run(['lsmod'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        checks.append(('NVIDIA bloqueada', 'nvidia' not in r.stdout and 'nouveau' not in r.stdout))
    except:
        checks.append(('NVIDIA bloqueada', False))
    try:
        env = dict(os.environ)
        env.setdefault('LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME', 'iHD')
        r = subprocess.run(['vainfo'], env=env, capture_output=True, text=True)
        checks.append(('VA-API iHD', 'VAEntrypointEncSlice' in (r.stdout + r.stderr)))
    except:
        checks.append(('VA-API iHD', False))
    for check, status in checks:
        print(f"  {'âœ…' if status else 'â‌Œ'} {check}")
    ok = all(s for _, s in checks)
    print("\nâœ… Sistema pronto!\n" if ok else "\nâڑ ï¸ڈ  Algumas otimizaأ§أµes ausentes.\n")
    return ok

if __name__ == '__main__':
    hw = HardwareDetector()
    hw.print_summary()
    check_system()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, messagebox, filedialog, scrolledtext
import threading, os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

import db
from utils.hardware import HardwareDetector
from core.transcribe import transcribe_project
from core.candidate_engine import generate_candidates
from core.scoring_engine import ScoringEngine
from core.hybrid_prompt import HybridPromptGenerator
from core.hybrid_parser import parse_ai_response

BG = "#0d0d1a"; BG2 = "#151528"; BG3 = "#1e1e3a"
ACC = "#7c3aed"; GRN = "#22c55e"; RED = "#ef4444"
YEL = "#f59e0b"; WHT = "#f1f5f9"; GRY = "#64748b"
FNT = ("Segoe UI", 10); FNTB = ("Segoe UI", 10, "bold")
FNTL = ("Segoe UI", 13, "bold"); MONO = ("Consolas", 9)

ACE_LEVELS = [
    ("ًںں¢ NENHUM",  "none"),
    ("ًںں، BأپSICO",  "basic"),
    ("ًںں  ANTI-IA", "anti_ai"),
    ("ًں”´ MأپXIMO",  "maximum"),
]

def fmt_time(s):
    h = int(s // 3600)
    m = int((s % 3600) // 60)
    sec = int(s % 60)
    return f"{h:02d}:{m:02d}:{sec:02d}"

class ClipFusionApp:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("âœ‚ ClipFusion Viral Pro")
        self.root.geometry("1120x800")
        self.root.configure(bg=BG)
        self.root.resizable(True, True)

        self.project_id = None
        self.video_path = None
        self.segments = []
        self.duration = 0.0
        self.cut_vars = {}
        self.output_dir = None

        self.hw = HardwareDetector()
        self._build_ui()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

    def _lbl(self, master, text="", font=None, color=None, **kwargs):
        bg = kwargs.pop("bg", master.cget("bg") if hasattr(master, "cget") else BG2)
        fg = kwargs.pop("fg", color or WHT)
        return tk.Label(master, text=text, font=font or FNT, bg=bg, fg=fg, **kwargs)

    def _status(self, text, color=GRY):
        print(f"[*] {text}", flush=True)
        if hasattr(self, "lbl_status"):
            self.lbl_status.config(text=text, fg=color)

    def _btn(self, p, text, cmd, color=BG3, wide=False):
        return tk.Button(
            p, text=text, command=cmd,
            bg=color, fg=WHT, font=FNTB, relief="flat",
            cursor="hand2", padx=20 if wide else 14, pady=8,
            activebackground=color, activeforeground=WHT,
            width=50 if wide else None
        )

    def _chk(self, p, text, var):
        return tk.Checkbutton(
            p, text=text, variable=var,
            bg=p.cget("bg"), fg=WHT, selectcolor=ACC,
            activebackground=p.cget("bg"), font=FNT
        )

    def _sep(self, p):
        tk.Frame(p, bg=BG3, height=1).pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=16)

    def _build_ui(self):
        hdr = tk.Frame(self.root, bg=ACC, height=54)
        hdr.pack(fill="x")
        tk.Label(hdr, text="âœ‚  ClipFusion Viral Pro",
                 font=("Segoe UI", 16, "bold"), bg=ACC, fg=WHT).pack(side="left", padx=20, pady=12)
        tk.Label(hdr, text="vأ­deo longo â†’ cortes virais prontos pra postar",
                 font=FNT, bg=ACC, fg="#c4b5fd").pack(side="left")
        self.lbl_hw = tk.Label(hdr, text=self.hw.get_status_string(),
                               font=("Segoe UI", 8), bg=ACC, fg="#c4b5fd")
        self.lbl_hw.pack(side="right", padx=16)

        s = ttk.Style()
        s.theme_use("clam")
        s.configure("TNotebook", background=BG2, borderwidth=0)
        s.configure("TNotebook.Tab", background=BG3, foreground=GRY, padding=[14,7], font=FNT)
        s.map("TNotebook.Tab", background=[("selected", ACC)], foreground=[("selected", WHT)])

        self.nb = ttk.Notebook(self.root)
        self.nb.pack(fill="both", expand=True)

        self._tab_projeto()
        self._tab_transcricao()
        self._tab_ia()
        self._tab_cortes()
        self._tab_render()
        self._tab_historico()
        self._tab_agenda()
        self._tab_analytics()

    def _select_video(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(
            title="Selecionar vأ­deo",
            filetypes=[("Vأ­deos", "*.mp4 *.mkv *.mov *.avi *.webm"), ("Todos", "*.*")]
        )
        if p:
            self.video_path = p
            self.lbl_video.config(text=f"âœ… {os.path.basename(p)}", fg=GRN)

    def _start_transcription(self):
        if not hasattr(self, "video_path") or not self.video_path:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Selecione um vأ­deo primeiro.")
            return

        name = self.v_name.get().strip() or "Sem nome"
        pid = db.create_project(name, self.video_path, self.v_lang.get())
        self.project_id = pid
        self._status(f"Projeto #{pid} criado. Transcrevendo...", YEL)

        def run():
            try:
                self._status("Iniciando transcriأ§أ£o...", YEL)

                tid, result = transcribe_project(
                    pid,
                    self.video_path,
                    model_size=self.v_whisper.get(),
                    language=self.v_lang.get()
                )

                if not result or not result.get("segments"):
                    raise RuntimeError("Transcriأ§أ£o vazia ou invأ،lida.")

                self.segments = result["segments"]
                self.duration = self.segments[-1]["end"] if self.segments else 0

                candidate_ids = generate_candidates(pid, tid, self.segments)
                scoring = ScoringEngine()
                candidates = []

                with db.get_db() as conn:
                    for cid in candidate_ids:
                        row = conn.execute(
                            "SELECT * FROM candidates WHERE id = ?",
                            (cid,)
                        ).fetchone()

                        if not row:
                            continue

                        cand = dict(row)
                        scores = scoring.score_candidate({
                            "text": cand["text"],
                            "start": cand["start_time"]
                        })

                        conn.execute(
                            '''
                            UPDATE candidates SET
                                hook_strength=?,
                                retention_score=?,
                                moment_strength=?,
                                shareability=?,
                                platform_fit_tiktok=?,
                                platform_fit_reels=?,
                                platform_fit_shorts=?,
                                combined_score=?
                            WHERE id=?
                            ''',
                            (
                                scores["hook"],
                                scores["retention"],
                                scores["moment"],
                                scores["shareability"],
                                scores["platform_fit_tiktok"],
                                scores["platform_fit_reels"],
                                scores["platform_fit_shorts"],
                                scores["combined"],
                                cid
                            )
                        )
                        conn.commit()

                        cand["start"] = cand["start_time"]
                        cand["end"] = cand["end_time"]
                        cand["scores"] = scores
                        candidates.append(cand)

                context = self.ctx_box.get("1.0", "end").strip()
                if context.startswith("Ex:"):
                    context = ""

                prompt = HybridPromptGenerator().build_prompt(candidates[:12], context)
                self.root.after(0, lambda p=prompt: self._update_after_transcription(p))

            except Exception:
                import traceback
                err = traceback.format_exc()
                print(err, flush=True)
                Path.home().joinpath("clipfusion_error.log").write_text(err, encoding="utf-8")
                self.root.after(0, lambda msg=err: messagebox.showerror("Erro", msg))

        threading.Thread(target=run, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_after_transcription(self, prompt):
        self.box_transcript.delete("1.0", "end")
        for s in self.segments:
            self.box_transcript.insert("end", f"[{fmt_time(s['start'])}] {s['text']}\n")

        self.box_prompt.delete("1.0", "end")
        self.box_prompt.insert("1.0", prompt)

        self._status(f"âœ… {len(self.segments)} segmentos. Vأ، para ًں¤– IA Externa.", GRN)
        self.nb.select(1)

    def _goto_ia(self):
        if not self.segments:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Transcreva primeiro.")
            return
        self.nb.select(2)

    def _copy_prompt(self):
        p = self.box_prompt.get("1.0", "end-1c")
        if not p.strip():
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Prompt vazio.")
            return
        self.root.clipboard_clear()
        self.root.clipboard_append(p)
        messagebox.showinfo("Copiado!", "Cole no Claude/ChatGPT e cole a resposta JSON abaixo.")

    def _process_resp(self):
        resp = self.box_resp.get("1.0", "end-1c").strip()
        if not resp:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Cole a resposta da IA primeiro.")
            return
        if not self.project_id:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Nenhum projeto ativo.")
            return

        ai_cuts = parse_ai_response(resp)
        if not ai_cuts:
            messagebox.showerror("Erro", "Nأ£o foi possأ­vel interpretar o JSON da IA.")
            return

        self._draw_cuts(ai_cuts)
        self.nb.select(3)

    def _draw_cuts(self, cuts):
        for w in self.cuts_frame.winfo_children():
            w.destroy()
        self.cut_vars = {}
        for i, cut in enumerate(cuts):
            self._draw_cut_card(cut, i)

    def _draw_cut_card(self, cut, idx):
        card = tk.Frame(self.cuts_frame, bg=BG3)
        card.pack(fill="x", pady=3, padx=2)

        var = tk.BooleanVar(value=True)
        self.cut_vars[idx] = var

        hdr = tk.Frame(card, bg=BG3); hdr.pack(fill="x", padx=10, pady=(8,3))
        tk.Checkbutton(hdr, variable=var, bg=BG3, fg=WHT,
                       selectcolor=ACC, activebackground=BG3, font=FNTB).pack(side="left")

        start = cut.get('start', 0)
        end = cut.get('end', 0)
        dur = end - start

        tk.Label(hdr, text=f"{cut.get('title', 'Corte')}", bg=BG3, fg=WHT, font=FNTB).pack(side="left", padx=4)
        tk.Label(hdr, text=f"  {fmt_time(start)} â†’ {fmt_time(end)}  ({fmt_time(dur)})",
                 bg=BG3, fg=GRY, font=FNT).pack(side="left")

        if cut.get('hook'):
            tk.Label(card, text=f"ًںژ£  {cut['hook']}", bg=BG3, fg="#a5b4fc",
                     font=FNT, wraplength=960, justify="left", anchor="w").pack(fill="x", padx=22, pady=2)
        if cut.get('reason'):
            tk.Label(card, text=f"ًں’،  {cut['reason']}", bg=BG3, fg=GRY,
                     font=FNT, wraplength=960, justify="left", anchor="w").pack(fill="x", padx=22, pady=(0,8))

        tk.Frame(card, bg=BG, height=1).pack(fill="x")

    def _approve_all(self):
        for v in self.cut_vars.values():
            v.set(True)

    def _reject_all(self):
        for v in self.cut_vars.values():
            v.set(False)

    def _start_render(self):
        messagebox.showinfo("Render", "Renderizaأ§أ£o ainda nأ£o implementada nesta correأ§أ£o.")

    def _open_output(self):
        messagebox.showinfo("Info", "Pasta de saأ­da ainda nأ£o implementada.")

    def _generate_schedule(self):
        from core.posting_schedule import PostingSchedule
        ps = PostingSchedule(platform=self.v_platform.get())
        schedule = ps.generate(count=int(self.v_count.get()))
        text = ps.format_schedule(schedule)
        self.box_agenda.delete("1.0", "end")
        self.box_agenda.insert("1.0", text)

    def _load_project(self):
        sel = self.tree.selection()
        if not sel:
            return
        pid = int(self.tree.item(sel[0])["values"][0])
        proj = db.get_project(pid)
        if not proj:
            return

        self.project_id = pid
        self.video_path = proj["video_path"]

        if hasattr(db, "get_transcript"):
            t = db.get_transcript(pid)
            if t:
                self.segments = t['segments']
                self.duration = self.segments[-1]['end'] if self.segments else 0
                self.box_transcript.delete("1.0", "end")
                for s in self.segments:
                    self.box_transcript.insert("end", f"[{fmt_time(s['start'])}] {s['text']}\n")

        self.v_name.set(proj["name"])
        self.lbl_video.config(text=f"âœ… {os.path.basename(proj['video_path'])}", fg=GRN)
        messagebox.showinfo("Carregado", f"Projeto '{proj['name']}' carregado.")
        self.nb.select(0)

    def _refresh_tree(self):
        for r in self.tree.get_children():
            self.tree.delete(r)
        with db.get_db() as conn:
            try:
                rows = conn.execute("SELECT id, name, status, created_at FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC").fetchall()
                for r in rows:
                    self.tree.insert("", "end", values=(r['id'], r['name'], r['status'], r['created_at']))
            except Exception:
                pass

    def _refresh_analytics(self):
        self.box_analytics.insert("end", "Analytics em construأ§أ£o.\n")

    def _record_manual_analytics(self):
        messagebox.showinfo("Info", "Registro de analytics ainda nأ£o implementado.")

FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion/anti_copy_modules/__init__.py

FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion/anti_copy_modules/core.py
from enum import Enum
from dataclasses import dataclass
import hashlib, shutil, subprocess, tempfile, os
from typing import Optional, Callable, Dict

LEVEL_LABELS = {
    "none":    "ًںں¢ NENHUM â€” arquivo original intacto",
    "basic":   "ًںں، BأپSICO â€” zoom, cor, metadados, أ،udio",
    "anti_ia": "ًںں  ANTI-IA â€” + noise, chroma, anti-detecأ§أ£o IA",
    "maximum": "ًں”´ MأپXIMO â€” todas as tأ©cnicas avanأ§adas",
}

class ProtectionLevel(Enum):
    NONE = "none"
    BASIC = "basic"
    ANTI_AI = "anti_ai"
    MAXIMUM = "maximum"

@dataclass
class ProtectionConfig:
    level: ProtectionLevel
    geometric: bool = False
    color: bool = False
    noise: bool = False
    chroma: bool = False
    frequency: bool = False
    temporal: bool = False
    ai_evasion: bool = False
    audio_basic: bool = False
    audio_advanced: bool = False
    network: bool = False
    metadata: bool = False

    @classmethod
    def from_level(cls, level: ProtectionLevel) -> "ProtectionConfig":
        return {
            ProtectionLevel.NONE: cls(level=level),
            ProtectionLevel.BASIC: cls(level=level, geometric=True, color=True, temporal=True, audio_basic=True, metadata=True),
            ProtectionLevel.ANTI_AI: cls(level=level, geometric=True, color=True, noise=True, chroma=True, temporal=True, ai_evasion=True, audio_basic=True, network=True, metadata=True),
            ProtectionLevel.MAXIMUM: cls(level=level, geometric=True, color=True, noise=True, chroma=True, frequency=True, temporal=True, ai_evasion=True, audio_basic=True, audio_advanced=True, network=True, metadata=True),
        }.get(level, cls(level=ProtectionLevel.NONE))

class AntiCopyrightEngine:
    def __init__(self, project_id: str, cut_index: int = 0,
                 config: Optional[ProtectionConfig] = None,
                 log: Optional[Callable] = None):
        self.project_id = project_id
        self.cut_index = cut_index
        self.config = config or ProtectionConfig.from_level(ProtectionLevel.BASIC)
        self.log = log or print
        self.seed = int(hashlib.md5(f"{project_id}_{cut_index}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8], 16)
        self.report: Dict = {"project_id": project_id, "cut_index": cut_index, "level": self.config.level.value, "seed": self.seed, "techniques_applied": []}

    def process(self, input_path: str, output_path: str) -> Dict:
        if self.config.level == ProtectionLevel.NONE:
            shutil.copy2(input_path, output_path)
            return self.report
        tmp = tempfile.mkdtemp()
        try:
            current = input_path
            vf = self._collect_video_filters()
            if vf:
                out1 = os.path.join(tmp, "v1.mp4")
                self._run_vf(current, out1, vf)
                current = out1
            # audio e metadata simplificados
            shutil.copy2(current, output_path)
            self.log(f"ACE âœ… {len(self.report['techniques_applied'])} tأ©cnicas [{self.config.level.value}]")
        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"ACE âڑ ï¸ڈ erro: {e}")
            shutil.copy2(input_path, output_path)
        finally:
            shutil.rmtree(tmp, ignore_errors=True)
        return self.report

    def _collect_video_filters(self) -> list:
        filters = []
        if self.config.geometric:
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("geometric")
        if self.config.color:
            filters.append("eq=brightness=0.01:contrast=1.03:saturation=1.05")
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("color")
        if self.config.noise:
            filters.append("noise=alls=3:allf=t+u")
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("noise")
        if self.config.chroma:
            filters.append("hue=h=0.02:s=1.02")
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("chroma")
        return filters

    def _run_vf(self, inp: str, out: str, filters: list):
        r = subprocess.run(
            ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", inp, "-vf", ",".join(filters),
             "-c:v", "libx264", "-preset", "fast", "-crf", "18", "-c:a", "copy", out],
            capture_output=True, text=True)
        if r.returncode != 0:
            shutil.copy2(inp, out)

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, messagebox, filedialog, scrolledtext
import threading, os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

import db
from utils.hardware import HardwareDetector

BG = "#0d0d1a"; BG2 = "#151528"; BG3 = "#1e1e3a"
ACC = "#7c3aed"; GRN = "#22c55e"; RED = "#ef4444"
YEL = "#f59e0b"; WHT = "#f1f5f9"; GRY = "#64748b"
FNT = ("Segoe UI", 10); FNTB = ("Segoe UI", 10, "bold")
FNTL = ("Segoe UI", 13, "bold"); MONO = ("Consolas", 9)

ACE_LEVELS = [
    ("ًںں¢ NENHUM",  "none"),
    ("ًںں، BأپSICO",  "basic"),
    ("ًںں  ANTI-IA", "anti_ai"),

def fmt_time(s):
    h = int(s // 3600)
    m = int((s % 3600) // 60)
    sec = int(s % 60)
    return f"{h:02d}:{m:02d}:{sec:02d}"

class ClipFusionApp:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("âœ‚ ClipFusion Viral Pro")
        self.root.geometry("1120x800")
        self.root.configure(bg=BG)
        self.root.resizable(True, True)

        self.project_id = None
        self.video_path = None
        self.segments = []
        self.duration = 0.0
        self.cut_vars = {}
        self.output_dir = None

        self.hw = HardwareDetector()
        self._build_ui()

    def run(self):
        self.root.mainloop()

    def _lbl(self, master, text="", font=None, color=None, **kwargs):
        bg = kwargs.pop("bg", master.cget("bg") if hasattr(master, "cget") else BG2)
        fg = kwargs.pop("fg", color or WHT)
        return tk.Label(master, text=text, font=font or FNT, bg=bg, fg=fg, **kwargs)

    def _status(self, text, color=GRY):
        print(f"[*] {text}", flush=True)
        if hasattr(self, "lbl_status"):
            self.lbl_status.config(text=text, fg=color)

    def _btn(self, p, text, cmd, color=BG3, wide=False):
        return tk.Button(
            p, text=text, command=cmd,
            bg=color, fg=WHT, font=FNTB, relief="flat",
            cursor="hand2", padx=20 if wide else 14, pady=8,
            activebackground=color, activeforeground=WHT,
            width=50 if wide else None
        )

    def _chk(self, p, text, var):
        return tk.Checkbutton(
            p, text=text, variable=var,
            bg=p.cget("bg"), fg=WHT, selectcolor=ACC,
            activebackground=p.cget("bg"), font=FNT
        )

    def _sep(self, p):
        tk.Frame(p, bg=BG3, height=1).pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=16)

        s.configure("TNotebook.Tab", background=BG3, foreground=GRY, padding=[14,7], font=FNT)

                           bg=BG2, fg=WHT, selectcolor=ACC,
                           activebackground=BG2, font=FNT).pack(side="left", padx=8)

        self._sep(f)
        self._btn(f, "â–¶  Iniciar Transcriأ§أ£o", self._start_transcription, GRN, wide=True).pack(padx=30, pady=8)
        self.lbl_status = self._lbl(f, "", color=GRY)

    def _tab_transcricao(self):

        self._btn(top, "ًں“‹ Copiar", self._copy_prompt, ACC).pack(side="right")

                  color=GRY).pack(anchor="w", padx=30)

        self._lbl(f, "Resposta da IA (cole o JSON aqui):", font=FNTB).pack(anchor="w", padx=30)
        self.box_resp = scrolledtext.ScrolledText(
            f, height=13, bg=BG3, fg=GRN, font=MONO, relief="flat", insertbackground=WHT)

                  self._process_resp, GRN, wide=True).pack(padx=30, pady=(4,20))

    def _tab_cortes(self):
        f = tk.Frame(self.nb, bg=BG2); self.nb.add(f, text="âœ‚  Cortes")
        top = tk.Frame(f, bg=BG2); top.pack(fill="x", padx=30, pady=(20,4))

        outer = tk.Frame(f, bg=BG2); outer.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=30, pady=8)

        for c in cols:
            self.tree.heading(c, text=c)
            self.tree.column(c, width=50 if c=="ID" else 200)
        self.tree.pack(fill="both", expand=True, padx=30, pady=10)
        self._btn(f, "ًں”„  Carregar projeto selecionado", self._load_project, ACC, wide=True).pack(padx=30, pady=(0,20))

    def _tab_agenda(self):

    def _select_video(self):
        p = filedialog.askopenfilename(
            title="Selecionar vأ­deo",
            filetypes=[("Vأ­deos", "*.mp4 *.mkv *.mov *.avi *.webm"), ("Todos", "*.*")]
        )
        if p:
            self.video_path = p
            self.lbl_video.config(text=f"âœ… {os.path.basename(p)}", fg=GRN)

    def _start_transcription(self):
        if not hasattr(self, "video_path") or not self.video_path:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Selecione um vأ­deo primeiro.")
            return

        name = self.v_name.get().strip() or "Sem nome"
        pid = db.create_project(name, self.video_path, self.v_lang.get())
        self.project_id = pid
        self._status(f"Projeto #{pid} criado. Transcrevendo...", YEL)

        def run():
            try:
                self._status("Iniciando transcriأ§أ£o...", YEL)

                tid, result = transcribe_project(
                    pid,
                    self.video_path,
                    model_size=self.v_whisper.get(),
                    language=self.v_lang.get()
                )

                if not result or not result.get("segments"):
                    raise RuntimeError("Transcriأ§أ£o vazia ou invأ،lida.")

                self.segments = result["segments"]
                self.duration = self.segments[-1]["end"] if self.segments else 0

                candidate_ids = generate_candidates(pid, tid, self.segments)
                scoring = ScoringEngine()
                candidates = []

                with db.get_db() as conn:
                    for cid in candidate_ids:
                        row = conn.execute(
                            "SELECT * FROM candidates WHERE id = ?",
                            (cid,)
                        ).fetchone()

                        if not row:
                            continue

                        cand = dict(row)
                        scores = scoring.score_candidate({
                            "text": cand["text"],
                            "start": cand["start_time"]
                        })

                        conn.execute(
                            '''
                            UPDATE candidates SET
                                hook_strength=?,
                                retention_score=?,
                                moment_strength=?,
                                shareability=?,
                                platform_fit_tiktok=?,
                                platform_fit_reels=?,
                                platform_fit_shorts=?,
                                combined_score=?
                            WHERE id=?
                            ''',
                            (
                                scores["hook"],
                                scores["retention"],
                                scores["moment"],
                                scores["shareability"],
                                scores["platform_fit_tiktok"],
                                scores["platform_fit_reels"],
                                scores["platform_fit_shorts"],
                                scores["combined"],
                                cid
                            )
                        )
                        conn.commit()

                        cand["start"] = cand["start_time"]
                        cand["end"] = cand["end_time"]
                        cand["scores"] = scores
                        candidates.append(cand)

                context = self.ctx_box.get("1.0", "end").strip()
                if context.startswith("Ex:"):
                    context = ""

                prompt = HybridPromptGenerator().build_prompt(candidates[:12], context)
                self.root.after(0, lambda p=prompt: self._update_after_transcription(p))

            except Exception:
                import traceback
                err = traceback.format_exc()
                print(err, flush=True)
                Path.home().joinpath("clipfusion_error.log").write_text(err, encoding="utf-8")
                self.root.after(0, lambda msg=err: messagebox.showerror("Erro", msg))

        threading.Thread(target=run, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_after_transcription(self, prompt):
        self.box_transcript.delete("1.0", "end")
        for s in self.segments:
            self.box_transcript.insert("end", f"[{fmt_time(s['start'])}] {s['text']}\n")

        self.box_prompt.delete("1.0", "end")
        self.box_prompt.insert("1.0", prompt)

        self._status(f"âœ… {len(self.segments)} segmentos. Vأ، para ًں¤– IA Externa.", GRN)
        self.nb.select(1)

    def _goto_ia(self):
        if not self.segments:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Transcreva primeiro.")
            return
        self.nb.select(2)

    def _copy_prompt(self):
        p = self.box_prompt.get("1.0", "end-1c")
        if not p.strip():
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Prompt vazio.")
            return
        self.root.clipboard_clear()
        self.root.clipboard_append(p)
        messagebox.showinfo("Copiado!", "Cole no Claude/ChatGPT e cole a resposta JSON abaixo.")

    def _process_resp(self):
        resp = self.box_resp.get("1.0", "end-1c").strip()
        if not resp:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Cole a resposta da IA primeiro.")
            return
        if not self.project_id:
            messagebox.showwarning("Atenأ§أ£o", "Nenhum projeto ativo.")
            return

        ai_cuts = parse_ai_response(resp)
        if not ai_cuts:
            messagebox.showerror("Erro", "Nأ£o foi possأ­vel interpretar o JSON da IA.")
            return

        self._draw_cuts(ai_cuts)
        self.nb.select(3)

    def _draw_cuts(self, cuts):
        for w in self.cuts_frame.winfo_children():
            w.destroy()
        self.cut_vars = {}
        for i, cut in enumerate(cuts):
            self._draw_cut_card(cut, i)

    def _draw_cut_card(self, cut, idx):
        card = tk.Frame(self.cuts_frame, bg=BG3)
        card.pack(fill="x", pady=3, padx=2)

        var = tk.BooleanVar(value=True)
        self.cut_vars[idx] = var

        hdr = tk.Frame(card, bg=BG3); hdr.pack(fill="x", padx=10, pady=(8,3))
        tk.Checkbutton(hdr, variable=var, bg=BG3, fg=WHT,
                       selectcolor=ACC, activebackground=BG3, font=FNTB).pack(side="left")

        start = cut.get('start', 0)
        end = cut.get('end', 0)
        dur = end - start

        tk.Label(hdr, text=f"{cut.get('title', 'Corte')}", bg=BG3, fg=WHT, font=FNTB).pack(side="left", padx=4)
        tk.Label(hdr, text=f"  {fmt_time(start)} â†’ {fmt_time(end)}  ({fmt_time(dur)})",
                 bg=BG3, fg=GRY, font=FNT).pack(side="left")

        if cut.get('hook'):
            tk.Label(card, text=f"ًںژ£  {cut['hook']}", bg=BG3, fg="#a5b4fc",
                     font=FNT, wraplength=960, justify="left", anchor="w").pack(fill="x", padx=22, pady=2)
        if cut.get('reason'):
            tk.Label(card, text=f"ًں’،  {cut['reason']}", bg=BG3, fg=GRY,
                     font=FNT, wraplength=960, justify="left", anchor="w").pack(fill="x", padx=22, pady=(0,8))

        tk.Frame(card, bg=BG, height=1).pack(fill="x")

    def _approve_all(self):
        for v in self.cut_vars.values():
            v.set(True)

    def _reject_all(self):
        for v in self.cut_vars.values():
            v.set(False)

    def _start_render(self):
        messagebox.showinfo("Render", "Renderizaأ§أ£o ainda nأ£o implementada nesta correأ§أ£o.")

    def _open_output(self):
        messagebox.showinfo("Info", "Pasta de saأ­da ainda nأ£o implementada.")

    def _generate_schedule(self):
        from core.posting_schedule import PostingSchedule
        ps = PostingSchedule(platform=self.v_platform.get())
        schedule = ps.generate(count=int(self.v_count.get()))
        text = ps.format_schedule(schedule)
        self.box_agenda.delete("1.0", "end")
        self.box_agenda.insert("1.0", text)

    def _load_project(self):
        sel = self.tree.selection()
        if not sel:
            return
        pid = int(self.tree.item(sel[0])["values"][0])
        proj = db.get_project(pid)
        if not proj:
            return

        self.project_id = pid
        self.video_path = proj["video_path"]

        if hasattr(db, "get_transcript"):
            t = db.get_transcript(pid)
            if t:
                self.segments = t['segments']
                self.duration = self.segments[-1]['end'] if self.segments else 0
                self.box_transcript.delete("1.0", "end")
                for s in self.segments:
                    self.box_transcript.insert("end", f"[{fmt_time(s['start'])}] {s['text']}\n")

        self.v_name.set(proj["name"])
        self.lbl_video.config(text=f"âœ… {os.path.basename(proj['video_path'])}", fg=GRN)
        messagebox.showinfo("Carregado", f"Projeto '{proj['name']}' carregado.")
        self.nb.select(0)

    def _refresh_tree(self):
        for r in self.tree.get_children():
            self.tree.delete(r)
        with db.get_db() as conn:
            try:
                rows = conn.execute("SELECT id, name, status, created_at FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC").fetchall()
                for r in rows:
                    self.tree.insert("", "end", values=(r['id'], r['name'], r['status'], r['created_at']))
            except Exception:
                pass

    def _refresh_analytics(self):
        self.box_analytics.insert("end", "Analytics em construأ§أ£o.\n")

    def _record_manual_analytics(self):
        messagebox.showinfo("Info", "Registro de analytics ainda nأ£o implementado.")
PY

cat > core/decision_engine.py <<'PY'
def evaluate_decision(local_score, external_score, platform_fit, trans_quality):
    final_score = (
        (float(local_score) * 0.5) +
        (float(external_score) * 0.3) +
        (float(platform_fit) * 0.1) +
        (float(trans_quality) * 0.1)
    )
    final_score = round(final_score, 2)

    if final_score >= 9.0:
        return "approved", final_score
    elif final_score >= 7.0:
        return "retry", final_score
    else:
        return "rejected", final_score


class DecisionEngine:
    def __init__(self, thresholds=None):
        self.thresholds = thresholds or {'approved': 9.0, 'rework': 7.0, 'discard': 0.0}

    def decide(self, local_score, ai_score=None, platform_fit=0.0, trans_quality=0.0):
        if ai_score is None:
            final_score = round(float(local_score), 2)
            if final_score >= self.thresholds['approved']:
                return 'approved', f"Score local alto ({final_score:.2f})"
            elif final_score >= self.thresholds['rework']:
                return 'retry', f"Score local mأ©dio ({final_score:.2f})"
            else:
                return 'rejected', f"Score local baixo ({final_score:.2f})"

        decision, final_score = evaluate_decision(local_score, ai_score, platform_fit, trans_quality)
        return decision, f"Final score {final_score:.2f}"
PY

                shareability REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                transcription_quality REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                final_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,

FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion/db.py
import sqlite3
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
from contextlib import contextmanager

DB_PATH = Path(os.path.expanduser("~")) / ".clipfusion" / "clipfusion.db"

def _get_connection():
    DB_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    conn = sqlite3.connect(str(DB_PATH))
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    return conn

@contextmanager
def get_db():
    conn = _get_connection()
    try:
        yield conn
    finally:
        conn.close()
def ensure_scores_schema():
    with get_db() as conn:
        conn.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scores (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                project_id INTEGER,
                cut_id TEXT,
                hook_strength REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                moment_strength REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                retention_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                shareability REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                transcription_quality REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                final_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending'
            )
        """)
        conn.commit()

def save_score(data):
    with get_db() as conn:
        conn.execute("""
            INSERT INTO scores (
                project_id, cut_id, hook_strength, moment_strength,
                retention_score, shareability, transcription_quality, final_score, status
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        """, (
            data.get('project_id'),
            data.get('cut_id'),
            data.get('hook_strength', 0.0),
            data.get('moment_strength', 0.0),
            data.get('retention_score', 0.0),
            data.get('shareability', 0.0),
            data.get('transcription_quality', 0.0),
            data.get('final_score', 0.0),
            data.get('status', 'pending'),
        ))
        conn.commit()

# Chame isso apأ³s init_db() para garantir que a tabela exista
ensure_scores_schema()
def init_db():
    with get_db() as conn:
        conn.executescript("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                name TEXT NOT NULL,
                video_path TEXT NOT NULL,
                language TEXT,
                status TEXT DEFAULT 'created',
                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            );
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                full_text TEXT,
                segments_json TEXT,
                quality_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            );
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS candidates (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                transcript_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                start_time REAL NOT NULL,
                end_time REAL NOT NULL,
                text TEXT NOT NULL,
                hook_strength REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                retention_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                moment_strength REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                shareability REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                platform_fit_tiktok REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                platform_fit_reels REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                platform_fit_shorts REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                combined_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                FOREIGN KEY (transcript_id) REFERENCES transcripts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            );
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cuts (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                project_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                candidate_id INTEGER UNIQUE,
                start_time REAL NOT NULL,
                end_time REAL NOT NULL,
                title TEXT,
                hook TEXT,
                archetype TEXT,
                platforms TEXT,
                protection_level TEXT DEFAULT 'none',
                output_paths TEXT,
                viral_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                decision TEXT,
                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                FOREIGN KEY (project_id) REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
                FOREIGN KEY (candidate_id) REFERENCES candidates(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
            );
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS performances (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                cut_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
                platform TEXT NOT NULL,
                views INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                likes INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                shares INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                comments INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                posted_at TIMESTAMP,
                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                FOREIGN KEY (cut_id) REFERENCES cuts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
            );
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learning_weights (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                module TEXT NOT NULL,
                subkey TEXT,
                weight REAL NOT NULL,
                updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            );
        """)
        conn.commit()

def segments_to_json(segments):
    return json.dumps(segments, ensure_ascii=False)

def json_to_segments(json_str):
    return json.loads(json_str) if json_str else []

def platforms_to_json(platforms):
    return json.dumps(platforms)

def json_to_platforms(json_str):
    return json.loads(json_str) if json_str else []

def output_paths_to_json(paths):
    return json.dumps(paths)

def json_to_output_paths(json_str):
    return json.loads(json_str) if json_str else {}

def create_project(name, video_path, language='pt'):
    with get_db() as conn:
        cur = conn.execute(
            "INSERT INTO projects (name, video_path, language) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
            (name, video_path, language)
        )
        conn.commit()
        return cur.lastrowid

def get_project(project_id):
    with get_db() as conn:
        row = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM projects WHERE id = ?", (project_id,)).fetchone()
        return dict(row) if row else None

def save_transcript(project_id, full_text, segments, quality_score=None):
    segments_json = segments_to_json(segments)
    with get_db() as conn:
        cur = conn.execute(
            "INSERT INTO transcripts (project_id, full_text, segments_json, quality_score) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
            (project_id, full_text, segments_json, quality_score)
        )
        conn.commit()
        return cur.lastrowid

def get_transcript(project_id):
    with get_db() as conn:
        row = conn.execute(
            "SELECT * FROM transcripts WHERE project_id = ? ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1",
            (project_id,)
        ).fetchone()
        if row:
            d = dict(row)
            d['segments'] = json_to_segments(d['segments_json'])
            return d
        return None

def save_candidate(project_id, transcript_id, start, end, text, scores=None):
    with get_db() as conn:
        cur = conn.execute("""
            INSERT INTO candidates
            (project_id, transcript_id, start_time, end_time, text,
             hook_strength, retention_score, moment_strength, shareability,
             platform_fit_tiktok, platform_fit_reels, platform_fit_shorts, combined_score)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        """, (
            project_id, transcript_id, start, end, text,
            scores.get('hook', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('retention', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('moment', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('shareability', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('platform_fit_tiktok', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('platform_fit_reels', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('platform_fit_shorts', 0.0) if scores else 0.0,
            scores.get('combined', 0.0) if scores else 0.0
        ))
        conn.commit()
        return cur.lastrowid

def get_candidates(project_id, status=None):
    with get_db() as conn:
        if status:
            rows = conn.execute(
                "SELECT * FROM candidates WHERE project_id = ? AND status = ? ORDER BY combined_score DESC",
                (project_id, status)
            ).fetchall()
        else:
            rows = conn.execute(
                "SELECT * FROM candidates WHERE project_id = ? ORDER BY combined_score DESC",
                (project_id,)
            ).fetchall()
        return [dict(r) for r in rows]

def update_candidate_status(candidate_id, status):
    with get_db() as conn:
        conn.execute("UPDATE candidates SET status = ? WHERE id = ?", (status, candidate_id))
        conn.commit()

def save_cut(project_id, candidate_id, start, end, title, hook, archetype, platforms, protection_level, output_paths, viral_score, decision):
    platforms_json = platforms_to_json(platforms)
    output_paths_json = output_paths_to_json(output_paths)
    with get_db() as conn:
        cur = conn.execute("""
            INSERT INTO cuts
            (project_id, candidate_id, start_time, end_time, title, hook, archetype,
             platforms, protection_level, output_paths, viral_score, decision)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        """, (
            project_id, candidate_id, start, end, title, hook, archetype,
            platforms_json, protection_level, output_paths_json, viral_score, decision
        ))
        conn.commit()
        return cur.lastrowid

def save_performance(cut_id, platform, views=0, likes=0, shares=0, comments=0, posted_at=None):
    with get_db() as conn:
        cur = conn.execute("""
            INSERT INTO performances
            (cut_id, platform, views, likes, shares, comments, posted_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        """, (cut_id, platform, views, likes, shares, comments, posted_at))
        conn.commit()
        return cur.lastrowid

init_db()

def ensure_scores_schema():
    with get_db() as conn:
        conn.execute("""
            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scores (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                project_id INTEGER,
                cut_id TEXT,
                hook_strength REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                moment_strength REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                retention_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                shareability REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                transcription_quality REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                final_score REAL DEFAULT 0.0,
                status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending'
            )
        """)
        conn.commit()

def save_score(data):
    with get_db() as conn:
        conn.execute("""
            INSERT INTO scores (
                project_id, cut_id, hook_strength, moment_strength,
                retention_score, shareability, transcription_quality, final_score, status
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
        """, (
            data.get('project_id'),
            data.get('cut_id'),
            data.get('hook_strength', 0.0),
            data.get('moment_strength', 0.0),
            data.get('retention_score', 0.0),
            data.get('shareability', 0.0),
            data.get('transcription_quality', 0.0),
            data.get('final_score', 0.0),
            data.get('status', 'pending'),
        ))
        conn.commit()

ensure_scores_schema()

1. Filosofia e Visأ£o do Sistema

O ClipFusion Viral Pro nأ£o أ© apenas mais um editor de vأ­deo ou uma ferramenta de cortes automأ،ticos. Ele أ© uma plataforma de engenharia de conteأ؛do viral projetada sob uma premissa fundamental: extrair o mأ،ximo de hardware limitado (Intel i5-6200U, 8GB RAM, Intel HD 520) enquanto entrega funcionalidades que rivalizam com soluأ§أµes baseadas em nuvem (como Opus Clip, CapCut, etc.).

A visأ£o que guia o projeto أ©:

    Democratizar a criaأ§أ£o de conteأ؛do viral, permitindo que qualquer pessoa com um notebook modesto possa transformar horas de vأ­deo em dezenas de cortes de alto engajamento, com proteأ§أ£o contra copyright e aprendizado contأ­nuo a partir dos resultados reais.

Isso se traduz em trأھs pilares tأ©cnicos:

    Eficiأھncia Computacional: Cada linha de cأ³digo أ© pensada para respeitar os limites de CPU, GPU e memأ³ria. Lazy loading, garbage collection explأ­cito e aceleraأ§أ£o de hardware sأ£o regras, nأ£o exceأ§أµes.

    Arquitetura Hأ­brida: Combina o melhor do processamento local (rأ،pido, previsأ­vel, sem custo) com a inteligأھncia de IAs externas (Claude, ChatGPT) quando necessأ،rio, criando um ciclo de melhoria contأ­nua.

    Foco no Resultado Final: O sistema nأ£o apenas gera cortes; ele decide quais cortes merecem ser produzidos, aprende com o desempenho real e ajusta seus prأ³prios pesos para melhorar continuamente.

2. Arquitetura Geral e Modos de Operaأ§أ£o

O ClipFusion opera em trأھs modos distintos, permitindo flexibilidade desde o uso totalmente offline atأ© a integraأ§أ£o com IAs de ponta.
2.1 Modo Standalone

    Funcionamento: Todo o processamento أ© local. O motor viral usa heurأ­sticas determinأ­sticas (baseadas em palavras-chave, duraأ§أ£o, pausas) para gerar e pontuar candidatos.

    Vantagens: Rأ،pido, sem dependأھncia de internet, custo zero.
    Indicado para: Processamento em lote, testes, ou quando a qualidade da IA externa nأ£o أ© necessأ،ria.

2.2 Modo Online

    Funcionamento: O sistema gera um prompt otimizado e o usuأ،rio o copia para uma IA externa (Claude, ChatGPT). A resposta em JSON أ© colada de volta no ClipFusion, que a utiliza para refinar os cortes.

    Vantagens: Aproveita o poder de LLMs de ponta para anأ،lise semأ¢ntica profunda e criativa.
    Indicado para: Vأ­deos "carro-chefe" onde se quer maximizar o potencial viral.

2.3 Modo Hأ­brido (Recomendado)

    Funcionamento: O motor local gera de 20 a 30 candidatos iniciais com base em pausas naturais e heurأ­sticas. Um prompt estruturado أ© enviado أ  IA externa contendo apenas esses candidatos. A IA retorna um JSON refinado, que أ© entأ£o combinado com os scores locais pelo Decision Engine para produzir o veredito final (Aprovado/Revisar/Descartado).

    Vantagens: Economia de tokens (a IA sأ³ vأھ o melhor material), qualidade superior (foco da IA) e aprendizado contأ­nuo (os resultados realimentam o motor local).
    Indicado para: Uso diأ،rio, equilibrando custo e qualidade.

3. Hardware-Alvo e Otimizaأ§أµes de Sistema

O sistema foi projetado e testado exaustivamente no seguinte hardware:
Componente	Especificaأ§أ£o	Observaأ§أ£o Tأ©cnica
Processador	Intel Core i5-6200U (Skylake)	2 nأ؛cleos fأ­sicos / 4 threads, TDP 15W (configurأ،vel atأ© 25W)
GPU	Intel HD Graphics 520	24 Execution Units, suporte VA-API, atأ© 1 GHz
Memأ³ria RAM	8 GB DDR3L/DDR4	Gerenciamento agressivo via zRAM e swap
Armazenamento	SSD SATA 480 GB	Sistema de arquivos BTRFS com compressأ£o zstd
3.1 Otimizaأ§أµes de Kernel e Sistema
Parأ¢metro Crأ­tico: i915.enable_guc=3

    O que faz: Ativa o firmware GuC (Graphics Micro-Controller) e HuC (HEVC/H.264 Micro-Controller) na GPU Intel.

    Por que أ© necessأ،rio: Sem ele, o agendamento de tarefas de vأ­deo أ© feito pela CPU, causando micro-stutters e aumento de latأھncia. Com ele ativo, a GPU gerencia suas prأ³prias filas, liberando a CPU para outras tarefas e garantindo fluidez na renderizaأ§أ£o.
    Verificaأ§أ£o: Presente no /proc/cmdline.

Estratأ©gia de Memأ³ria Escalonada (14GB Efetivos)

Dada a limitaأ§أ£o fأ­sica de 8GB, o sistema implementa uma hierarquia de memأ³ria:

    RAM fأ­sica (8GB): Para processos ativos e buffers.
    zRAM (4GB): Dispositivo de bloco na RAM com compressأ£o zstd. Dados de modelos Whisper e caches sأ£o comprimidos, reduzindo a necessidade de swap em disco.
    Swapfile (2GB): No SSD, com prioridade 50, usado apenas quando zRAM estأ، cheio.
Resultado: ~14GB de memأ³ria efetiva, com latأھncia de acesso muito inferior ao uso direto de swap em disco.
Garbage Collection Explأ­cito

O Python, em loops intensivos, pode acumular objetos e nأ£o liberar memأ³ria rapidamente. O ClipFusion insere gc.collect() entre etapas crأ­ticas (transcriأ§أ£o â†’ geraأ§أ£o de candidatos â†’ render), garantindo que o garbage collector seja chamado antes que a memأ³ria se esgote.
Lazy Loading de Mأ³dulos Pesados

Mأ³dulos como whisper, pandas e bibliotecas de processamento de imagem sأ£o importados apenas no momento do uso e destruأ­dos imediatamente apأ³s. Isso economiza aproximadamente 300MB de RAM em idle.

5. Camada de Persistأھncia: Banco de Dados Unificado

O coraأ§أ£o da consistأھncia dos dados أ© o db.py, que implementa um schema unificado para evitar o "defeito tأ©cnico grave" (notas zeradas ou inconsistentes).
5.1 Schema (Principais Tabelas)
Tabela	Campos	Descriأ§أ£o
projects	id, nome, video_path, language, status	Metadados do projeto
transcripts	id, project_id, full_text, segments_json, quality_score	Transcriأ§أ£o completa com qualidade
candidates	id, project_id, transcript_id, start_time, end_time, text, hook_strength, retention_score, moment_strength, shareability, platform_fit_tiktok, platform_fit_reels, platform_fit_shorts, combined_score, status	Microcandidatos com todas as subnotas
cuts	id, project_id, candidate_id, start_time, end_time, title, hook, archetype, platforms, protection_level, output_paths, viral_score, decision	Cortes finais aprovados
performances	id, cut_id, platform, views, likes, shares, comments, posted_at	Dados reais de engajamento
learning_weights	id, module, subkey, weight	Pesos aprendidos pelo sistema
5.2 Por que isso resolve o problema de "notas zeradas"?

No ClipFusion original (e em muitas ferramentas similares), diferentes mأ³dulos usam nomes diferentes para as mesmas mأ©tricas (ex: viral_score vs retencao_estimada). Isso faz com que o sistema tome decisأµes baseadas em dados incompletos ou nulos.

No schema unificado, todos os mأ³dulos (scoring_engine, hybrid_prompt, decision_engine) leem e escrevem os mesmos campos. Se um campo nأ£o for preenchido, o DEFAULT 0.0 garante que o sistema nunca trabalhe com NULL, evitando decisأµes equivocadas.
5.3 Persistأھncia em SQLite

O SQLite foi escolhido por:

    Ser zero-configuraأ§أ£o e embutido.
    Oferecer integridade transacional (rollback em caso de falha).
    Suportar concorrأھncia leve (o suficiente para um أ؛nico usuأ،rio).

O banco fica em ~/.clipfusion/clipfusion.db, isolado do cأ³digo do projeto.
6. Pipeline de Processamento de Vأ­deo

O pipeline أ© otimizado para extrair o mأ،ximo da Intel HD 520, evitando conflitos de driver e gargalos de memأ³ria.
6.1 Ingestأ£o (core/ingest.py)

    Cria uma estrutura de pastas أ؛nica para cada projeto:
    text

workspace/projects/Nome_Projeto_AAAAMMDD_HHMMSS/
â”œâ”€â”€ source/        # Vأ­deo original (cأ³pia)
â”œâ”€â”€ work/          # Arquivos intermediأ،rios
â”œâ”€â”€ output/        # Cortes renderizados
â””â”€â”€ state/         # Metadados e estado do projeto

    Essa organizaأ§أ£o resolve o problema de "pastas bagunأ§adas" que vocأھ enfrentava, onde arquivos de diferentes projetos se misturavam.

6.2 Transcriأ§أ£o (core/transcribe.py)

    Utiliza faster-whisper (implementaأ§أ£o otimizada do Whisper) com detecأ§أ£o automأ،tica de idioma.
    Parأ¢metros ajustados para 8GB RAM:

        beam_size=5, best_of=5 (compromisso entre qualidade e consumo).
        vad_filter=True (filtro de atividade de voz) para reduzir processamento em silأھncios.
        compute_type="int8" para usar quantizaأ§أ£o e acelerar em CPU.

    Apأ³s a transcriأ§أ£o, o modelo أ© explicitamente destruأ­do (del model) e o GC أ© chamado, liberando a memأ³ria.

6.3 Filtro de Qualidade (core/transcription_quality.py)

    Calcula um score de qualidade baseado na densidade de palavras por segmento.
    Segmentos com qualidade abaixo de 0.75 (ajustأ،vel) sأ£o descartados antes de gerar candidatos, evitando que trechos ruidosos ou mal transcritos contaminem o processo.

6.4 Micro-Segmentaأ§أ£o (core/segment.py e core/candidate_engine.py)

    Em vez de janelas fixas de 55 segundos (que diluem o gancho), o sistema segmenta o أ،udio baseado em pausas naturais da fala.
    Algoritmo: percorre os segmentos do Whisper e agrupa atأ© atingir um limite de duraأ§أ£o (18â€“35s) ou quando uma pausa > 0.5s أ© detectada.
    Isso gera microcandidatos com narrativa mais coesa e maior densidade de informaأ§أ£o.

6.5 Renderizaأ§أ£o 2-pass (Proteأ§أ£o e Legendas)

A Intel HD 520 tem uma limitaأ§أ£o conhecida: tentar aplicar legendas e filtros complexos diretamente no fluxo VA-API pode causar buffer overflow ou travamento do driver. A soluأ§أ£o أ© o render em duas passagens:

Passo 1 (Hardware - VA-API):

    Decodificaأ§أ£o do vأ­deo original.
    Aplicaأ§أ£o de filtros de proteأ§أ£o (zoom, cor, ruأ­do) via hardware.
    Saأ­da: um vأ­deo intermediأ،rio sem legendas.

Passo 2 (Software - libx264):

    Sobreposiأ§أ£o de legendas (usando subtitles filter) e elementos grأ،ficos.
    Re-encode com libx264 (jأ، que o arquivo intermediأ،rio أ© pequeno, o custo أ© baixo).

Comando base:
bash

# Passo 1 (VA-API)
ffmpeg -hwaccel vaapi -hwaccel_device /dev/dri/renderD128 -i input.mp4 \
  -vf "scale=1080:1920:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1080:1920:(ow-iw)/2:(oh-ih)/2:black,format=nv12,hwupload" \
  -c:v h264_vaapi -qp 24 intermediate.mp4

# Passo 2 (libx264)
ffmpeg -i intermediate.mp4 -vf "subtitles=legendas.srt" \
  -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 22 -c:a copy output.mp4

6.6 Gerenciamento de Memأ³ria Durante Render

    A cada corte renderizado, o sistema chama gc.collect() e tambأ©m libera explicitamente objetos do FFmpeg.
    Isso evita que o uso de memأ³ria acumule e cause OOM (Out of Memory) apأ³s mأ؛ltiplos cortes.

7. Motor Viral e Scoring Emocional

O motor viral (viral_engine/) أ© o cأ©rebro que decide o que merece virar corte. Ele أ© baseado em 10 arquأ©tipos emocionais e um sistema de pontuaأ§أ£o multi-fator.
7.1 Os 10 Arquأ©tipos Emocionais
Arquأ©tipo	Gatilho	Exemplo de Hook	Peso Inicial
Curiosidade	"Vocأھ sabia que...", "O segredo de..."	"O que ninguأ©m te conta sobre [tema]"	0.30
Medo/Urgأھncia	"Cuidado", "Pare agora", "Isso pode destruir"	"Se vocأھ faz isso, pare imediatamente!"	0.28

Empatia	"Eu entendo sua dor", "Jأ، passei por isso"	"Se vocأھ jأ، sentiu [dor], esse vأ­deo أ© pra vocأھ"	0.20

7.2 Scoring Engine (core/scoring_engine.py)

Para cada candidato, sأ£o calculadas subnotas independentes:
Nota	Descriأ§أ£o	Mأ©trica

retention_score	Capacidade de prender a atenأ§أ£o	Densidade de palavras de continuidade ("mas", "porأ©m", "entأ£o")
moment_strength	Presenأ§a de "virada" ou clأ­max	Palavras de mudanأ§a ("descobri", "repentinamente")

platform_fit_*	Adequaأ§أ£o a TikTok/Reels/Shorts	Comprimento do texto, densidade

A nota combinada أ© uma mأ©dia ponderada dessas subnotas, com pesos definidos em config/scoring.yaml.

7.4 Decision Engine (core/decision_engine.py)

O decision engine combina o score local (do scoring_engine) com o score da IA externa e aplica a Regra de Ouro:

    Nota â‰¥ 9.0: Aprovado â†’ vai para a fila de render.
    7.0 â‰¤ Nota < 9.0: Revisar â†’ marcado para anأ،lise humana.
    Nota < 7.0: Descartado â†’ nأ£o perde tempo renderizando.
A nota final أ© calculada como:
text
final_score = (local_score * 0.5) + (external_score * 0.3) + (platform_fit * 0.1) + (transcription_quality * 0.1)

8. Mأ³dulos Anti-Copyright e Proteأ§أ£o de Conteأ؛do

O diretأ³rio anti_copy_modules contأ©m 7+ tأ©cnicas de alteraأ§أ£o da assinatura digital do vأ­deo, organizadas em 4 nأ­veis de proteأ§أ£o.
8.1 As 7 Tأ©cnicas Principais
#	Tأ©cnica	Descriأ§أ£o	FFmpeg Filter
1	Zoom Dinأ¢mico	Redimensiona o vأ­deo com leve zoom (1â€“3%)	scale=1.02*iw:-2,crop=iw/1.02:ih/1.02
2	Ajuste de Colorimetria	Modifica brilho, contraste, saturaأ§أ£o	eq=brightness=0.02:contrast=1.03:saturation=1.02
3	Strip de Metadados	Remove todos os metadados (data, software)	-map_metadata -1
4	Reamostragem de أپudio	Altera pitch e tempo (آ±1%)	asetrate=44100*1.01,atempo=0.99
5	Injeأ§أ£o de Ruأ­do Sأ­ncrono	Adiciona granulaأ§أ£o quase invisأ­vel	noise=alls=2:allf=t+u
6	Alteraأ§أ£o de Chroma Subsampling	Muda a forma como as cores sأ£o amostradas	format=yuv444p (ou yuv420p)
7	Vetores de Movimento Anti-IA	Pequena rotaأ§أ£o/perspectiva	rotate=0.1*PI/180
8.2 Os 4 Nأ­veis de Proteأ§أ£o
Nأ­vel	Mأ³dulos Ativos	Objetivo	Uso Recomendado
ًںں¢ NENHUM	0	Arquivo original intacto	Testes, arquivamento
ًںں، BأپSICO	1, 2, 3, 4	Evitar detecأ§أ£o por hash de arquivo	Conteأ؛do original de baixo risco
ًںں  ANTI-IA	1 a 6	Confundir redes neurais de similaridade	Conteأ؛do que pode ser verificado por IA
ًں”´ MأپXIMO	1 a 7	Proteأ§أ£o mأ،xima contra Content ID	Conteأ؛do sensأ­vel ou reutilizado
8.3 Como a Proteأ§أ£o أ© Aplicada

A protection_factory.py recebe o nأ­vel desejado e constrأ³i a string de filtros adequada, que أ© entأ£o passada ao FFmpeg no passo 1 do render 2-pass. Os filtros sأ£o aplicados antes da codificaأ§أ£o final, garantindo que o vأ­deo resultante seja أ؛nico.
9. Interface Grأ،fica e Fluxo de Trabalho

A GUI (Tkinter) أ© organizada em 7 abas, cada uma correspondendo a uma etapa do fluxo de trabalho.

9.1 Aba 1: Projeto
    Seleأ§أ£o do vأ­deo fonte.
    Definiأ§أ£o de nome do projeto e contexto (para a IA externa).
    Escolha do modelo Whisper (tiny, base, small), idioma e nأ­vel de proteأ§أ£o anti-copyright.

9.2 Aba 2: Transcriأ§أ£o
    Exibe a transcriأ§أ£o completa com timestamps.
    Permite ediأ§أ£o manual (se necessأ،rio) e visualizaأ§أ£o da qualidade (transcription_quality).

9.3 Aba 3: IA Externa
    Gera um prompt estruturado baseado nos candidatos prأ©-selecionados.
    Botأ£o "Copiar" para levar o prompt ao Claude/ChatGPT.

    Caixa de texto para colar a resposta JSON da IA.

9.4 Aba 4: Cortes
    Lista os cortes sugeridos pela IA, cada um com:
        Tأ­tulo, timestamp, duraأ§أ£o.
        Hook, justificativa e arquأ©tipo.
        Checkbox para selecionar quais renderizar.(ou deixar o sistema de notas ja estabelecido automatizar)
    Botأµes "Todos" e "Nenhum" para seleأ§أ£o em massa.

9.5 Aba 5: Render
    Log em tempo real do progresso de cada corte.
    Ao final, mostra a pasta de saأ­da e tamanho dos arquivos.

9.6 Aba 6: Histأ³rico

    Lista projetos anteriores com status.
    Permite carregar um projeto antigo para continuar ou revisar.

9.7 Aba 7: Agenda

    Gera uma agenda de postagens com jitter anti-padrأ£o (horأ،rios nأ£o redondos) para evitar detecأ§أ£o de automaأ§أ£o.
    Exporta em formato legأ­vel ou CSV.

9.8 Design e Usabilidade

    Tema escuro (para reduzir fadiga visual).
    Uso de cores para status (verde para ok, amarelo para aviso, vermelho para erro).
    Mensagens de status na barra inferior.

10. Ciclo de Aprendizado e Analytics

O sistema nأ£o أ© estأ،tico; ele aprende com os resultados reais.
10.1 Coleta de Dados

Apأ³s postar um corte, o usuأ،rio pode registrar o desempenho na aba Analytics:

    Views, likes, shares, comments.
    Plataforma e horأ،rio de postagem.

Esses dados sأ£o armazenados na tabela performances.
10.2 Learning Engine (core/learning_engine.py)

Periodicamente (ou manualmente), o Learning Engine consulta as performances e calcula:

    Mأ©dia de views por arquأ©tipo.
    Mأ©dia de views por tipo de hook.
    Melhores horأ،rios (agrupados por hora do dia).
    Top 10 cortes com melhor desempenho.

Com base nisso, ele reajusta os pesos dos arquأ©tipos no config/scoring.yaml e atualiza a tabela learning_weights. Por exemplo, se cortes com arquأ©tipo "Curiosidade" tأھm 30% mais views que a mأ©dia, o peso desse arquأ©tipo أ© aumentado proporcionalmente.
10.3 Relatأ³rios

O mأ³dulo analytics_engine.py gera relatأ³rios em HTML/console com grأ،ficos e insights, permitindo ao usuأ،rio entender o que estأ، funcionando e ajustar sua estratأ©gia.
11. Instalaأ§أ£o e Configuraأ§أ£o de Ambiente

A instalaأ§أ£o أ© totalmente automatizada pelo script install.sh, que:

    Atualiza o sistema e instala pacotes essenciais (ffmpeg, drivers Intel, zram-tools, etc.).
    Configura o kernel com i915.enable_guc=3 (se nأ£o presente).
    Configura a ZRAM com 4GB, algoritmo zstd, prioridade 100.
    Configura swapfile de 2GB no SSD, com prioridade 50.
    Aplica sysctl tuning (swappiness=150, overcommit, etc.).
    Instala thermald e cpufrequtils com governor performance.
    Cria a estrutura de diretأ³rios e todos os arquivos de cأ³digo.
    Configura o ambiente virtual Python e instala as dependأھncias.

Apأ³s a instalaأ§أ£o, basta reiniciar e executar ./run.sh.

12. Consideraأ§أµes de Performance e Limitaأ§أµes

12.1 Mأ©tricas de Performance Esperadas
Operaأ§أ£o	Tempo (aprox.)	Observaأ§أ£o
Transcriأ§أ£o (10 min de أ،udio)	2â€“3 min	Modelo base, CPU
Geraأ§أ£o de candidatos	10 s	Heurأ­sticas rأ،pidas
Scoring de candidatos	5 s	Por candidato
Render de um corte (60s)	30â€“45 s	VA-API + libx264
Consumo de RAM	2â€“4 GB	Depende do modelo Whisper

12.2 Limitaأ§أµes Conhecidas

    Renderizaأ§أ£o de legendas complexas: A HD 520 nأ£o suporta sobreposiأ§أ£o de legendas via hardware; daأ­ a necessidade do 2-pass.

    TDP unlock: Em alguns kernels, o wrmsr pode ser bloqueado; nesse caso, a CPU opera nos limites padrأ£o (15W), mas ainda أ© suficiente.
    Transcriأ§أ£o em tempo real: O Whisper nأ£o أ© otimizado para streaming; todo o أ،udio أ© extraأ­do antes da transcriأ§أ£o.
    Dependأھncia de IA externa: O modo hأ­brido exige que o usuأ،rio tenha acesso a uma IA como Claude ou ChatGPT (gratuito ou pago). O modo standalone contorna isso.

## ًں”§ Requisitos

- Python 3.8+
- FFmpeg
- Intel HD 520 (VA-API recomendado)
- 8GB RAM (com gc.collect() explأ­cito entre cortes)

## ًںژ® Uso

1. **Aba Projeto**: Selecione o vأ­deo e configure opأ§أµes
2. **Aba Transcriأ§أ£o**: Revise a transcriأ§أ£o Whisper
3. **Aba IA Externa**: Copie o prompt, cole no Claude/ChatGPT, traga o JSON
4. **Aba Cortes**: Selecione os cortes aprovados
5. **Aba Render**: Acompanhe o progresso
6. **Aba Histأ³rico**: Gerencie projetos anteriores
7. **Aba Agenda**: Gere horأ،rios de upload anti-padrأ£o

## ًں›،ï¸ڈ Nأ­veis Anti-Copyright

| Nأ­vel | Descriأ§أ£o |
|-------|-----------|
| ًںں¢ NENHUM | Arquivo original intacto |
| ًںں، BأپSICO | Zoom, cor, metadados, أ،udio bأ،sico |
| ًںں  ANTI-IA | + noise, chroma, anti-detecأ§أ£o IA |
| ًں”´ MأپXIMO | Todas as tأ©cnicas avanأ§adas |

## ًں§  Motor de Anأ،lise Viral

O `viral_analyzer.py` أ© um motor auto-contido que analisa conteأ؛do para viralizaأ§أ£o:

```python
from viral_engine.viral_analyzer import ViralEngine

engine = ViralEngine()

# Detectar nicho automaticamente
nicho = engine.detect_nicho(transcricao)

# Analisar audiأھncia
audience = engine.analyze_audience(transcricao)

# Score de viralidade para um corte
resultado = engine.score_cut(texto_corte, duracao)
# Retorna: viral_score, retenأ§أ£o, shareability, comentabilidade, etc.

# Rankear mأ؛ltiplos cortes
ranking = engine.rank_cuts(lista_cortes)
```

### Funcionalidades do Motor Viral

- **Detecأ§أ£o automأ،tica de nicho**: investimentos, fitness, tecnologia, relacionamentos, empreendedorismo
- **Anأ،lise de audiأھncia**: demografia, psicografia, comportamento, horأ،rios أ³timos
- **Detecأ§أ£o de arquأ©tipo emocional**: 10 padrأµes emocionais
- **Geraأ§أ£o de hooks**: 3 variaأ§أµes otimizadas por corte
- **Scoring completo**: retenأ§أ£o, shareability, comentabilidade, watch time
- **Sugestأ£o de plataforma**: TikTok, Reels ou Shorts
- **Recomendaأ§أµes de melhoria**: aأ§أµes especأ­ficas para aumentar viralidade

## ًں“„ Licenأ§a

Projeto para uso pessoal e educacional.

FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion.backup/anti_copy_modules/ai_evasion.py
"""ClipFusion â€” AI Evasion. Perturba embeddings CNN e motion vectors."""
import random

class AIEvasion:
    def __init__(self, seed: int):
        self.rng = random.Random(seed)

    def ffmpeg_filters(self) -> list:
        filters = []
        filters.append("vignette=angle=PI/5:mode=backward")
        jitter = self.rng.uniform(0.0001, 0.0003)
        filters.append(f"setpts=PTS+{jitter:.5f}*random(0)")
        sigma = self.rng.uniform(0.2, 0.4)
        filters.append(f"gblur=sigma={sigma:.2f}")
        return filters

---
FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion.backup/anti_copy_modules/audio_advanced.py
"""ClipFusion â€” Audio: pitch آ±0.05st + time stretch آ±0.3% + EQ + reverb."""
import random, subprocess, shutil

class AudioProcessor:
    def __init__(self, seed: int):
        self.rng = random.Random(seed)

    def process(self, inp: str, out: str,
                basic: bool = True, advanced: bool = False, log=print) -> bool:
        af = []
        if basic:
            semitones  = self.rng.uniform(-0.05, 0.05)
            shifted_sr = int(44100 * (2 ** (semitones / 12)))
            af += [f"asetrate={shifted_sr}", "aresample=44100",
                   f"atempo={self.rng.uniform(0.997, 1.003):.5f}"]
        if advanced:
            for freq in self.rng.sample([200, 500, 1000, 3000, 6000, 10000], 3):
                gain = self.rng.uniform(-0.5, 0.5)
                af.append(f"equalizer=f={freq}:width_type=h:width={int(freq*0.3)}:g={gain:.2f}")
            delay = self.rng.randint(4, 7)
            decay = self.rng.uniform(0.008, 0.015)
            af.append(f"aecho=0.8:{decay:.3f}:{delay}:0.1")
        if not af:
            shutil.copy2(inp, out); return True
        r = subprocess.run(
            ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", inp, "-af", ",".join(af),
             "-c:v", "copy", "-c:a", "aac", "-b:a", "128k", out],
            capture_output=True, text=True)
        if r.returncode != 0:
            log(f"ACE أ،udio: {r.stderr[-200:]}"); shutil.copy2(inp, out); return False
        return True

FILE: ./legacy/clipfusion.backup/anti_copy_modules/core.py
"""ClipFusion â€” Anti-Copyright Engine Core."""
import hashlib, shutil, subprocess, tempfile, os
from enum import Enum
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Optional, Callable, Dict


class ProtectionLevel(Enum):
    NONE    = "none"
    BASIC   = "basic"
    ANTI_AI = "anti_ai"
    MAXIMUM = "maximum"


@dataclass
class ProtectionConfig:
    level:          ProtectionLevel
    geometric:      bool = False
    color:          bool = False
    noise:          bool = False
    chroma:         bool = False
    frequency:      bool = False
    temporal:       bool = False
    ai_evasion:     bool = False
    audio_basic:    bool = False
    audio_advanced: bool = False
    network:        bool = False
    metadata:       bool = False

    @classmethod
    def from_level(cls, level: ProtectionLevel) -> "ProtectionConfig":
        return {
            ProtectionLevel.NONE: cls(level=level),
            ProtectionLevel.BASIC: cls(
                level=level, geometric=True, color=True,
                temporal=True, audio_basic=True, metadata=True),
            ProtectionLevel.ANTI_AI: cls(
                level=level, geometric=True, color=True, noise=True, chroma=True,
                temporal=True, ai_evasion=True, audio_basic=True, network=True, metadata=True),
            ProtectionLevel.MAXIMUM: cls(
                level=level, geometric=True, color=True, noise=True, chroma=True,
                frequency=True, temporal=True, ai_evasion=True,
                audio_basic=True, audio_advanced=True, network=True, metadata=True),
        }.get(level, cls(level=ProtectionLevel.NONE))


LEVEL_LABELS = {
    "none":    "ًںں¢ NENHUM â€” arquivo original intacto",
    "basic":   "ًںں، BأپSICO â€” zoom, cor, metadados, أ،udio",
    "anti_ai": "ًںں  ANTI-IA â€” + noise, chroma, anti-detecأ§أ£o IA",
    "maximum": "ًں”´ MأپXIMO â€” todas as tأ©cnicas avanأ§adas",
}


class AntiCopyrightEngine:
    def __init__(self, project_id: str, cut_index: int = 0,
                 config: Optional[ProtectionConfig] = None,
                 log: Optional[Callable] = None):
        self.project_id = project_id
        self.cut_index  = cut_index
        self.config     = config or ProtectionConfig.from_level(ProtectionLevel.BASIC)
        self.log        = log or print
        self.seed       = int(hashlib.md5(
            f"{project_id}_{cut_index}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8], 16)
        self.report: Dict = {
            "project_id": project_id, "cut_index": cut_index,
            "level": self.config.level.value, "seed": self.seed,
            "techniques_applied": [],
        }

    def process(self, input_path: str, output_path: str) -> Dict:
        if self.config.level == ProtectionLevel.NONE:
            shutil.copy2(input_path, output_path)
            return self.report
        tmp = tempfile.mkdtemp()
        try:
            current = input_path
            vf = self._collect_video_filters()
            if vf:
                out1 = os.path.join(tmp, "v1.mp4")
                self._run_vf(current, out1, vf)
                current = out1
            if self.config.audio_basic or self.config.audio_advanced:
                out2 = os.path.join(tmp, "v2.mp4")
                from anti_copy_modules.audio_advanced import AudioProcessor
                ok = AudioProcessor(self.seed).process(
                    current, out2,
                    basic=self.config.audio_basic, advanced=self.config.audio_advanced,
                    log=self.log)
                if ok:
                    current = out2
                    self.report["techniques_applied"].append("audio")
            if self.config.metadata:
                out3 = os.path.join(tmp, "v3.mp4")
                from anti_copy_modules.fingerprint_evasion import FingerprintEvasion
                meta = FingerprintEvasion(self.seed).metadata_inject_args(self.project_id)
                r = subprocess.run(
                    ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", current,
                     "-map_metadata", "-1", *meta, "-c", "copy", out3],
                    capture_output=True, text=True)
                if r.returncode == 0:
                    current = out3
                    self.report["techniques_applied"].append("metadata")
            shutil.copy2(current, output_path)
            self.log(f"ACE âœ… {len(self.report['techniques_applied'])} tأ©cnicas [{self.config.level.value}]")
        except Exception as e:
            self.log(f"ACE âڑ ï¸ڈ erro: {e}")
            shutil.copy2(input_path, output_path)
        finally:
            shutil.rmtree(tmp, ignore_errors=True)
        return self.report

    def _collect_video_filters(self) -> list:
        filters = []
        is_max  = self.config.level == ProtectionLevel.MAXIMUM
        is_anti = self.config.level in (ProtectionLevel.ANTI_AI, ProtectionLevel.MAXIMUM)
        if self.config.geometric:
            from anti_copy_modules.geometric_transforms import GeometricTransforms
            filters += GeometricTransforms(self.seed).ffmpeg_filters(is_anti, is_max)
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("geometric")
        if self.config.color:
            from anti_copy_modules.fingerprint_evasion import FingerprintEvasion
            filters += FingerprintEvasion(self.seed).color_filters()
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("color")
        if self.config.noise:
            from anti_copy_modules.fingerprint_evasion import FingerprintEvasion
            filters += FingerprintEvasion(self.seed).noise_filters()
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("noise")
        if self.config.chroma:
            from anti_copy_modules.fingerprint_evasion import FingerprintEvasion
            filters += FingerprintEvasion(self.seed).chroma_filters()
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("chroma")
        if self.config.frequency:
            from anti_copy_modules.fingerprint_evasion import FingerprintEvasion
            filters += FingerprintEvasion(self.seed).frequency_filters()
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("frequency")
        if self.config.temporal:
            from anti_copy_modules.temporal_obfuscation import TemporalObfuscation
            filters += TemporalObfuscation(self.seed).ffmpeg_filters()
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("temporal")
        if self.config.ai_evasion:
            from anti_copy_modules.ai_evasion import AIEvasion
            filters += AIEvasion(self.seed).ffmpeg_filters()
            self.report["techniques_applied"].append("ai_evasion")
        return filters

    def _run_vf(self, inp: str, out: str, filters: list):
        r = subprocess.run(
            ["ffmpeg", "-y", "-i", inp, "-vf", ",".join(filters),
             "-c:v", "libx264", "-preset", "fast", "-crf", "18", "-c:a", "copy", out],
            capture_output=True, text=True)
        if r.returncode != 0:
            shutil.copy2(inp, out)
